The graphics are now 256 color VGA. There is also much more music than in the original version, and it supports more advanced sound formats.

meta.name: Lemmings
meta.desc: Tu tarea consiste en rescatar a los Lemmings en 120 niveles de acertijos vertiginosos. Estas criaturas simplemente caminan a ciegas por el mundo con la esperanza de alcanzar la seguridad al final del nivel; desafortunadamente, estos niveles incluyen caídas pronunciadas, huecos en el suelo, barreras y ríos, entre otros peligros.

meta.name: Lemmings
meta.desc: Tu tarea consiste en rescatar a los Lemmings en 120 niveles de acertijos vertiginosos. Estas criaturas simplemente caminan a ciegas por el mundo con la esperanza de alcanzar la seguridad al final del nivel; desafortunadamente, estos niveles incluyen caídas pronunciadas, huecos en el suelo, barreras y ríos, entre otros peligros.

meta.name: Holiday Lemmings 1993
meta.desc: Based on the original classic game Lemmings, Holiday Lemmings was a small stand-alone game that was released during the early 1990s holiday seasons. It features classic Lemmings gameplay, only with Christmas-themed levels. The basic objective is to use the Lemmings' special abilities to create a path to the exit that all the Lemmings can follow. Your goal is to try and keep as many Lemmings alive as possible.

meta.name: Holiday Lemmings 1994
meta.desc:
The 1994 edition of Holiday Lemmings is the second full game in the series of Christmas-themed Lemmings games, after two free demos in 1991 and 1992 and a commercial 1993 version.
Gameplay is unchanged from the original game: players are tasked with leading a horde of Lemmings to the level exit by assigning them special abilities. The holiday theme shows in snow-covered landscapes, the Lemmings wearing Christmas outfits and appropriate background music. The game includes 32 all-new levels, grouped into two difficulties: Frost and Hail. It also comes with all 32 levels from the 1993 version (Flurry and Blizzard difficulties).

meta.name: Xmas Lemmings 1991
meta.desc:
Xmas Lemmings 1991 is a freely available Christmas-themed demo for Lemmings. It contains two exclusive levels and two levels from Oh No! More Lemmings (as a way of promoting it).
The two exclusive levels feature Christmas landscapes, decorations, and music. In addition, all of the lemmings wear Santa outfits for all four levels.

meta.name: Xmas Lemmings 1992
meta.desc: Xmas Lemmings 1992 is a freely available Christmas-themed demo for Lemmings. It contains four exclusive levels featuring Christmas landscapes, decorations, and music. In addition, all of the lemmings wear Santa outfits.

meta.name: Leonardo
meta.desc: En este juego de rompecabezas de arriba abajo, debes ayudar a Leonardo, un ladrón de poca monta, en sus movimientos criminales. Usa tu joystick para guiar a Leonardo a través de 50 niveles diferentes, incluyendo bancos, museos y almacenes. Al pulsar el botón de disparo de tu joystick, puedes empujar todo lo que esté en tu camino, excepto las paredes. Los objetos empujados no se detendrán hasta que choquen con otros objetos o con el oficial de policía y su fantasmal ayudante que intentan detener tus robos. Cada nivel es más grande que la pantalla, en la mitad inferior de la pantalla tienes un útil radar para orientarte. Si te quedas sin tiempo o te atrapa la policía, perderás una de tus cinco vidas. Si consigues dominar los diez primeros niveles, recibirás una contraseña con la que podrás empezar la siguiente partida directamente en ese nivel.

meta.name: Lethal Weapon
meta.desc: En este juego, basado en la serie de películas, podemos controlar tanto al agente Riggs como a Murtaugh, cada uno con sus propios atributos. Mientras que Riggs tiene un mejor disparo, Murtaugh tiene un salto más largo. Con cualquiera de los personajes tenemos que realizar una serie de misiones, que podemos elegir desde un principio, y entre ellas está rescatar a Leo Getz, desconectar una bomba en un centro comercial o simplemente acabar con una banda terrorista. Una vez que completamos todas las misiones, accederemos al último nivel del juego.

meta.name: Lethal Xcess : Wings of Death II
meta.desc: Lethal Xcess is a shoot 'em up game developed by two members of demo crew X-Troll and published by Eclipse Software in 1991 for the Atari ST and Amiga. It is a sequel to 1990's Wings of Death, in which its wizard hero goes into far future to fight the descentants of the evil witch that he has conquered in the first game. Despite having been acclaimed by critics, the game was a commercial failure.

meta.name: Lethal Zone
meta.desc: Lethal Zone es un shooter horizontal alemán al puro estilo R-Type. Pilotando una nave, revientas naves y obstáculos enemigos, esquivando proyectiles y sin darte hostias contra nada. Mantén pulsado fuego y suéltalo para un disparo potente; machácalo seguido para soltar una ráfaga. Los enemigos palmados dejan power-ups de vez en cuando; cógelos para potenciar y tunear tus tiros. Empiezas con 5 vidas, y cada 50.000 puntos te cae una extra. Cuatro niveles, cada uno con su boss único al final.

meta.name: Lettrix
meta.desc: En Lettrix, tienes que resolver puzzles. Utilizando piezas de diferentes formas, tienes que rellenar una parte específica de la pantalla, representada por una zona gris. Cuanto más avances en el juego, más complicados serán los puzles y menos piezas encontrarás.

meta.name: Leviathan
meta.desc: Leviathan se desarrolla en paisajes isométricos de ciencia ficción en los que hay que destruir a todos los enemigos. El jugador controla una nave espacial y tiene que volar a través de tres niveles (con la posibilidad de girar y cambiar la altura de vuelo). Además de enemigos voladores, también hay estaciones de defensa terrestres que destruir. Aunque la munición es ilimitada, el combustible debe rellenarse regularmente aterrizando junto a una cápsula de combustible. Tres bombas inteligentes que destruyen todo lo que hay en la pantalla pueden utilizarse en situaciones peligrosas. Cada nivel tiene un límite de tiempo.

meta.name: Licence to Kill
meta.desc:
Un juego de acción/arcade de James Bond basado en la peli del mismo nombre. Te toca vengar la muerte de Felix Leiter, que palmó a manos del barón de la droga Sanchez.
En realidad, son varias secuencias de acción con scroll vertical. En cada fase, vuelas, conduces o vas a pata por un terreno fijo, reventando enemigos, esquivando sus balas y pillando ítems (sobre todo munición). Algunos niveles son puro tiroteo, otros te la ponen dura con los reflejos.

meta.name: Life & Death
meta.desc:
Life & Death is a game which casts you as a doctor in a hospital. Your job is to diagnose patients and administer appropriate therapies, or even perform surgery when necessary. 
To diagnose a patient, you have to press on his or her abdomen, to see which portions of the stomach cause pain. Basing on this knowledge, you can choose a therapy for him (observation, medication or referring to another specialist) or administer a X-Ray or ultrasound scan to get more information about his illness. 
In some cases, surgery will be necessary. You're the surgeon and you have to perform the operation very carefully, adhering strictly to the procedures, preserving hygiene, and maintaining care when cutting up the patient. 
Should you mistakenly administer the wrong therapy, or kill your patient at the operating table, you're kicked into the medical school, where you're given hints as to what you've done wrong.

meta.name: The Light Corridor
meta.desc:
El objetivo del juego es guiar una bola a través de laberintos sembrados de trampas en un universo tridimensional. Paredes, barreras y otros obstáculos estáticos o móviles son las dificultades que hay que superar con paciencia y destreza. El juego también cuenta con un editor de niveles para crear tus propios laberintos.
Mueves una paleta vertical y horizontalmente en un plano justo delante de la pantalla para propulsar la pelota, y luego la sigues por el nivel, desviándola antes de que caiga detrás de ti. Al principio, los obstáculos son todos estáticos, pero las barreras móviles requieren sincronización, reacciones y suerte.
También hay varios objetos de bonificación, que debes recoger al pasar por ellos: una L para una pelota extra y un rectángulo doble que te da una segunda raqueta que se mueve aleatoriamente.

meta.name: Line of Fire
meta.desc: Line of Fire es un shooter en primera persona inspirado en Operation Wolf. Estás atrapado tras las líneas enemigas y tienes que escapar a toda costa. A lo largo de 8 niveles, dispararás al menor indicio de presencia enemiga. Las situaciones son variadas, y tienes que salir del campo de visión de un francotirador o tomar el control de barcos, por ejemplo. Además, tu viaje te llevará de la jungla a la base enemiga o a una ciudad en ruinas.

meta.name: Links : The Challenge of Golf
meta.desc:
If takes something pretty special these days to raise even half an I eyebrow as far as golf sims are concerned, so you may be unenthusiastic at first about the claim on Link's packaging that it's a 'Golf simulation so realistic, you'll think you're there!'. Okay, such a claim is obviously a wild exaggeration, but you can't fail to be impressed by the excellent course backgrounds and options available. The animation is very smooth on the eye, and the swing of the clubs isn't impossible to control either.
I feel that I must warn you now about the one and only serious problem with this game, and for some of you it will make the prospect of a round with Links virtually impossible to bear. Every time you take a shot, your trusty old Amiga will take an average of about 25 seconds to redraw the view for your next pot at the flag. After a while this becomes very frustrating indeed, and as you can probably imagine, it takes about two hours to complete a full round. I suppose it does represent a realistic golf simulation if you take the last two points into account though. After all, the few occasions that have seen me venture onto a real golf course hove ended approximately a couple of hours later in tears of frustration.
I still like Links despite this fault, and just think what the mark below could have been if it wasn't so slow to play.
Just a final point to say that to play Links, you'll need either a hard disk or two floppy drives but A3000 + WHDLoad is recommended combination.

meta.name: The Lion King
meta.desc:
Young Simba just can't wait to be king. His father is the current King of the Savannah and the young prince is able to frolic the lands at will; jumping on and around other subjects of this animal kingdom. When Simba's father, King Mufasa, is killed and his evil brother Scar takes over the kingdom, Simba is banished from the lands of his birthright and has to grow up fast, honing his skills, for the day of his return.
The Lion King, based on the famous Disney movie, is a platform game where you control Simba - initially as a young cub, and later as an adult lion. The plot of the game follows the plot of the movie. Each of the levels represents a part of the movie. 
As young Simba, you can fight various beasts, such as lizards, by jumping on them. You can also roar to scare some creatures into submission, though every time you roar, you have to wait for your "roar meter" to charge. 
As an adult lion, you can still roar and jump, but now you fight enemies by slashing at them with your claws (if you're skillful enough, you can also grab them and toss them off the screen). 
The game features no in-game save function, and it needs to be replayed from the beginning every time.

meta.name: Little Computer People
meta.desc: Little Computer People te permite ver cómo un hombre y su perro viven su vida en su casa. El hombre actúa como cualquier otra persona en su vida diaria, pero también puedes interactuar con él jugando a las cartas, por ejemplo. También puedes darle instrucciones y a veces te enviará cartas en las que describe cómo vive y si es feliz. Se considera un precursor de los Sims.

meta.name: Little Puff in Dragonland
meta.desc: Puff es un pobre dragoncito que decide explorar el mundo más allá de su hogar: Dragonlandia. Por desgracia, se ha perdido y quiere volver a casa. Puff es demasiado pequeño para ir solo en esta aventura, así que tienes que guiarlo a través de muchos niveles, resolviendo puzzles, evitando trampas y encontrando las cuatro partes del pase para volver a Dragonland.

meta.name: Live and Let Die
meta.desc: Eres James Bond 007 y debes impedir que Mr. Big reparta heroína gratis. Controlas una lancha que puede destruir barcos enemigos y alcanzar las 100 mph. Tienes que esquivar o reventar las lanchas enemigas y evitar su fuego defensivo.

meta.name: Livingstone  2
meta.desc:
Miles de extraños ruidos le rodeaban, era la selva, tenía prestas sus armas: las granadas, el boomerang, sus látigos. ¡Que se anden con cuidado las avestruces, los tigres, los leones, las águilas, las tribus salvajes, los sacerdotes y el templo de la Diosa Nierere!
Si le ayudas lo puedes conseguir. Dr. Livingstone, ¿Supongo?

meta.name: Locomotion
meta.desc: In this action-packed game, you control the only train capable of supplying a desperate town in the Badlands, which is under constant threat from marauding bandits. Your mission is to navigate between stations while avoiding enemy forces determined to stop you. You can move the train forward or backward by shifting the control stick and change tracks to avoid obstacles or enemies. Pressing the fire button releases smoke to shoot down enemy planes. Along the way, you'll encounter mailbags for bonus points and water towers to replenish your water supply. Each level gets progressively harder with more enemies, and after completing each one, you face a bonus level where you shoot down planes for extra points. The challenge grows with every level, testing your reflexes and strategy.

meta.name: Lollypop
meta.desc: Lollypop es un juego de plataformas en 3D para Amiga en el que juegas como la joven muñeca Lolly. Un día, cuando se despierta, Lolly tiene un hambre terrible de azúcar. Chocolates, helados o malvaviscos... Todo es bueno para satisfacer su desbordante apetito. Pero el mundo de los dulces no es tan angelical. A través de varios entornos, desde el pueblo fantasma, hasta los sueños de Lolly, pasando por un mundo nevado, deberás destruir a tus enemigos, ¡decididos a bloquear el camino hacia tu estómago!

meta.name: Loopz
meta.desc: It couldn't be simpler. You get pieces of different sizes and shapes. One by one you put them down on the playing board - soon you've made your first loop. Yeaaaah! Now it's not so easy. This time you didn't get the pieces you wanted. Never mind - just start another loop.All of a sudden the board's getting just a little too crowded. Now you're struggling to find a place to drop the pieces (who cares where they go, you can't afford to let the timer run down because you'll lose a life). Now it's getting really hectic. Did you honestly think this game was simple (and this is just the first level of Game A)? Pretty soon you'll be dreaming about Loopz. Wondering if next time you'll be able to make a longer loop than ever before - or more loops than your record. Will Loopz drive you crazy? You bet!

meta.name: Lords of Chaos
meta.desc:
Turn-based strategy game based on Julian Gollop's earlier games, Chaos and Laser Squad. The setting is pure fantasy Ã¢â‚¬â€ the Old World is wrecked by magical discharges, and the wizards who attempted to keep it balanced ultimately gave up, and used their skill to create a new world. These Lords of Chaos (up to four, played either by human or computer) may now battle for control of this world.
The idea of the game is to escape the level within a certain number of moves (preferably carrying lot of treasure and having killed the evil wizard Torquemada). Along the way you can use wizardry weapons and spells (there are 45 in total, created by combining ingredients) to conjure up mystical creatures like dragons and unicorns, but unfortunately so can Torquemada. Worlds include marshlands, castles and forests.

meta.name: Lords of the Realm
meta.desc:
The English throne lies empty in 1268 A.D.  You and 5 lords are locked in a struggle for the crown.  Reap the benefits of successful feudal governing, castle-building, castle-sieging, and land battle to conquer your rivals and claim the kingdom.
You must keep your serfs fed and happy.  Then assign them to farming, herding, building, military and other tasks.  Design your own castles or build them using actual historical blueprints.  Then lay siege to your neighbors' castles and fight out land battles in tactical detail.

meta.name: Lords of the Rising Sun
meta.desc:
Japan, 12th century. After your father has been murdered, you set out on a quest to become Shogun to restore the honor of your family.
You'll have to defeat all your enemies - including your brother.
Most of the time, you'll move your troops through the big map of Japan - as soon as something happens, you'll have to fight your enemies in action sequences, such as a Gauntlet-like fortress attack or defending against a Ninja assassin. If two troops collide, a battle might ensue in which you'll have to use all your strategical wits to guide your men to victory.

meta.name: Lords of Time
meta.desc:
Lords of Time is an action role-playing game for Amiga systems
You are Major Thom, a test pilot in the First Experimental Wing of the United Air Force. While testing the multidimensional friction propulsion generator, a flux anomaly appeared before the player, warping them to an alternate planet. As the plane careened out of control, the player ejected safely, but lost consciousness in the descent. Awakening beside a small campfire, the player is advised to seek out the human King Tanor.
An action role-playing game, the player must navigate the world to eventually find the secrets to returning to their own land. Combat is in real-time, and the player must regularly eat and sleep in the evening in order to maintain good health. The player can purchase equipment and skill upgrades during their adventures, and can converse with the various inhabitants of the land. The player must ultimately seek out the archmage Tessak, and receive help from the Druids and Dwarves. Finally, the player must defeat the evil archmage Kruel with Tessak's help, and escape the land.

meta.name: Lords of War
meta.desc:
1990 saw the release of Lords of War on the Amiga systems, a Breakout clone game with interesting idea, created and distributed by Digital Concepts.
On every screen, there is a castle defended by a movable shield. The shield can be moved horizontally and vertically (always along the castle wall). The goal is to bring down the walls of one of the other castles within a given time limit. If no one does this in time, the game automatically switches to "fast speed" until the first slot is shattered.
The well animated graphic looks decent, changes from level to level and the scrolling is nice. The sound effects are according to the atmosphere, beautifully creepy - timely. You can not complain about the joystick control either. What else is there? Menu with numerous options (faster, slower, etc.), pause function, highscore list. The gameplay is not exactly the latest, but the original presentation and the built-in gags, The Lords of War lift something of the usual breakout monotony from. After all...

meta.name: Lost Dutchman Mine
meta.desc: Lost Dutchman Mine is a simulation game that casts the player in the role of a gold miner in the 1860's. The player can freely explore a town and a vast desert, limited only by the protagonist's necessity to eat and rest. One of the game's goals is to earn money, which can be achieved by searching gold in a river, mining for gold, or capturing wanted criminals. It is possible to buy food or catch fish with a fishing gear equipped. Hostile explorers and dangerous animals impede the protagonist's process. Location layout and characters are randomly generated each time the player begins the game.

meta.name: Lost In Mine
meta.desc: Lost in Mine es un juego de rompecabezas de desplazamiento lateral. La acción tiene lugar en una mina. El objetivo es recoger todas las monedas y llegar a la salida antes de que se acabe el tiempo. Esto solo se puede completar maniobrando correctamente los dispositivos de control de la plataforma y utilizando máquinas mineras en ubicaciones adecuadas.

meta.name: The Lost Vikings
meta.desc: Tres vikingos, Eric el veloz, Olaf el robusto y Baleog el feroz, fueron secuestrados por el alienígena Tomator, el malvado gobernante croata, que está recogiendo formas de vida únicas para exhibirlas en su galería. Los tres vikingos tendrán que combinar sus habilidades únicas para derrotar a Tomator, así como un vasto conjunto de alienígenas, robots, caracoles gigantes, grandes lagartos y más.

meta.name: Lotus Turbo Challenge 2
meta.desc:
En la secuela de Lotus Esprit Turbo Challenge la carrera tiene lugar en ocho circuitos distintos, con nuevos efectos de superficie y clima, como el desierto y la nieve. Más adelante, debe correr a través de autopistas de dos sentidos con tráfico aproximándose (automóviles y camiones civiles).
Ya no está compitiendo directamente contra otros autos o dando vueltas; en cambio, las carreras se basan en el tiempo, hay un tiempo limitado para llegar a cada punto de control. Alcanzar cada uno de estos extiende el tiempo y el restante se convierte en puntos de bonificación si completa con éxito la pista.

meta.name: Lotus III : The Ultimate Challenge
meta.desc:
Lotus III: The Ultimate Challenge presentaba 2 modos de juego: en un modo compites contra 19 rivales (con nombres tan ingeniosos como Alain Phosphate y Crash-Hard Banger), y en el otro modo te enfrentas contra-reloj.
Hay 13 tipos diferentes de carreras, que van desde autopistas, carreras nocturnas o carreteras en obras, y algunas se basan en dar vueltas al circuito y otras son simplemente un trayecto del punto A al punto B. El juego tiene modo 2 jugadores en modo de pantalla dividida.
La gloria suprema del juego, sin embargo, fue el editor RECS, que te permitía crear tus propios pistas con posibilidades casi ilimitadas.

meta.name: Lotus Esprit Turbo Challenge
meta.desc:
Compite con un automóvil Lotus Esprit Turbo SE a través de 32 circuitos de todo el mundo, divididos en 3 niveles de dificultad. Hay 19 rivales de ordenador y tienes que acabar entre los 10 primeros para progresar. Cuanto más alto termines en una carrera, más abajo en la grilla empezarás la siguiente. Los pilotos rivales tienen nombres de broma basados en los pilotos de F1 de la época: por ejemplo, Ricardo Pastry y Crashhard Banger.
En la versión para Amiga, al introducir MONSTER y SEVENTEEN como nombres de los jugadores 1 y 2 respectivamente, se revela un minijuego oculto: un sencillo shooter de temática espacial, en el que el objetivo es sobrevivir el mayor tiempo posible mientras se dispara a las rocas que vuelan alrededor.

meta.name: Lunar-c
meta.desc: Lunar C back story revolves around a giant dreadnought attacking an unnamed planet. The player takes the role of the chosen hero and boards their flying saucer to eliminate the aliens called Sirians. The game is a horizontal scrolling shooter. After a wave of enemies is destroyed, they release a power-up token. Collecting it will advance the weapon select gauge by one step, similar to Gradius. In this way, the weapon systems of the player's ship can be upgraded. If the player hits an enemy or a bullet, their energy bar is reduced. At the end of each level, a guardian awaits that needs to be destroyed in order to advance further in the game.

meta.name: Lupo Alberto - The Videogame
meta.desc:
Funny Italian platform game based on a comic of the same name, the game consists of 10 levels in which Lupo Alberto (or Martha the hen, his girlfriend) must find a place to make love. 
You can choose whether to control Alberto, Martha or both simultaneously in two-player mode. The two characters have different characteristics, for example Marta can jump slightly higher. Occasionally they can also get weapons and other power-ups like protective helmets, shoes to go faster etc.

meta.name: Luxor
meta.desc:
The evil Okira clan of space pirates have kidnapped your beloved princess Diora, and are now holding the Empire to ransom...
You must search three planets to find your princess, and each one will be heavily guarded with highly trained Okira warriors. Find the planet that Diora is being held on, destroy the pirates, and a fairy will grant you a single wish.
Love and magic will help you win the day - you must not fail in this mission. Collect power points to recharge your guns and life-support systems as you battle through the planets.

meta.name: M1 Tank Platoon
meta.desc: M1 Tank Platoon es un simulador táctico de guerra de tanques desarrollado y publicado por MicroProse para Commodore Amiga, Atari ST y MS-DOS en 1989. El juego presenta una mezcla de guerra de tanques en primera persona y juego de simulación táctica.

meta.name: Mad Show
meta.desc: Hasta seis jugadores pueden competir en este extraño y futurista programa de juegos presentado en la pantalla de un televisor (acabado de madera y todo). Cada turno comienza con un giro de la rueda: gana la apuesta y anotas, pierdes y participas en un concurso de tu elección ... hasta la muerte. Los concursos son al menos un poco desquiciados, si no francamente locos: primero está Mad Space, que te reta a un duelo con sables de luz en una roca espacial flotante. El siguiente es la máquina loca, donde persigues a un pequeño robot alrededor de una habitación llena de trampas mecánicas y tratas de golpearlo en la cabeza con un escudo de metal. Mad Tunnel es un juego de estilo frisbee, como Discs of Tron, si se jugara con hojas de sierra y cohetes sobre un grupo de caimanes mutados. Finalmente, Mad Virus lo arroja de un lado a otro en una cinta transportadora (a través de jaulas de mutantes hambrientos) mientras intenta destruir el cerebro gigantesco que lo controla.

meta.name: Mafdet and the Book of the Dead
meta.desc:
This is a budget game and budget games have a preordained right to have an element of tackiness, right? Wrong. Since the dawn of time it seems that only one out of every fifteen new budget titles were good, and it looks like staying that way on the Amiga.
Set in Egypt you play the part of the cat goddess Mafdet who is trying to recover the Book of the Dead which has been stolen by the evil god Seth and unless it is recovered no Egyptian will be able to enter the afterlife.
Being a god Mafdet can transform into a cat as well as her normal human form. In cat mode Mafdet can run, jump and pick up objects - not too much use against the minions of Seth, but at least they don't notice you. As a woman you can swing a fairly brutal sword.
The general playing area is large, and I found myself noticing a new exit from the screens just as I thought I was stuck. Some exits are too low to allow the woman to pass through until you run into them with the cat. Other times a hole in the floor is the best way through.
The graphics are really large, though the animation and definition fail to make any lasting impact. As well as not being exactly too pretty to look at the main character is also impossible to control accurately. Mafdet is depressing to play, it's not that cheap and it most definitely isn't cheerful.

meta.name: Magic Boy
meta.desc: Join Magic Boy as he attempts to become a master wizard, and he does this by shooting enemies, putting them in a bag, and throwing them away. He also must get through four areas: Sand Land, Wet World, Plastic Place, and Future Zone. There are also several power-ups that help him on his quest.

meta.name: Magic Fly
meta.desc:
Your enemy have designed a new fighter craft, the Moth. The only prototype is held in a network of caves within an asteroid, heavily protected by 30 different types of craft. As a pilot of the T2 'Magic Fly' craft, it is your job to find and destroy the Moth.
You fly through a set of tunnels presented in a mixture of vectors and solid 3D, with arrows guiding you as to which way to go. The ship's damage is split into ten areas, and the auto-repair feature can be set to prioritise these. Energy resources are limited, and must be allocated across different areas of the ship.
Accurate steering and shooting are not enough Ã¢â‚¬â€œ puzzles protect the route, and these will take some pondering. You are armed with multiple weapons (types of lasers, mines, a rear-gunning-droid and various guiding missiles), each of which has its own use. You also have an on-board map and radar, as well as a turbo facility.

meta.name: Magician
meta.desc: The Magician is a 2D platform game set in a fantasy world. The player controls a "typical" magician with a magic wand which can shoot fireballs. The player travels from left to right, avoids enemies and various obstacles (He can use 3 tracks to move, game has 2.5 gameplay from many beat'em ups) and collect various items such as books.

meta.name: Magic Johnson's Basketball
meta.desc:
Magic Johnson's Basketball is a decent arcade-style basketball game starring LA Lakers' superstar Magic Johnson, one of the most famous players of all time. It is a direct translation of the popular coin-op arcade game called Magic Johnson's Fastbreak Basketball. Like the arcade original, the game is easy enough for beginners to learn, and challenging enough for experts. You can play against the computer or another human opponent in a hot-seat mode.
As an arcade-oriented game, Magic Johnson's Basketball is pretty good. You can shoot 3-pointers, perform slam dunks, and of course Magic Johnson's famous fast break with a slam dunk finish. The game includes a good training sequence, demo mode, and smooth animation.
When compared with other basketball games made during the same period, Magic Johnson's Basketball falls flat with many limitations. You can only play a single game, unlike the entire season that Ed Ringler's Omni-Play Basketball (also a Magic Johnson-promoted game) simulates. And the on-court action is far from the fun of EA's 1988 classic One on One: Jordan vs. Bird. Without the competition, Magic Johnson's Basketball would have been considered a great game. But basketball fans simply have many better choices to choose from than this game.

meta.name: Dizzy IV : Magicland Dizzy
meta.desc:
Magicland Dizzy is a platform adventure game published in Europe in 1990 by Codemasters for the ZX Spectrum, Commodore 64 and Amiga platforms.   It is the sixth game in the Dizzy series, and the fourth adventure-based Dizzy title. The story, set in a fantasy world called Magicland, follows on from the events of Fantasy World Dizzy, the previous adventure title. In Magicland Dizzy the player controls Dizzy, an egg-shaped character, who is trying to save six of his friends who have been placed under spells by the Evil Wizard Zaks.
In Magicland Dizzy the player guides Dizzy, an egg-shaped character, through a large maze in an attempt to rescue his six friends who are held captive under the influence of various magic spells. The locations are all located in the titular "Magicland" and are fantastical in nature, many inspired by fairy tales. They include a field of standing stones called Weirdhenge, a witch's island and Prince Charming's castle. Movement from one screen to the next is enabled through flip-screen such that when Dizzy touches the outer edge of one screen he is transported to the next. The individual screens consist of platforms and ladders with Dizzy able to both walk and jump to navigate the maze and its obstacles. Dizzy can collect up to three items at once which are then used at specific locations to solve puzzles and advance through the game. At the start of the game the player has three lives and a health bar which can be replenished by finding and collecting diamonds scattered throughout the maze.

meta.name: Magic Lines
meta.desc: In this puzzle game you should fill all empty vials with magical red substance resembling the blood. To do this you should move the tiles and combine the pipe system, manipulating the free cell of tiles mosaic like it is done in famous "Fifteen puzzle". Some tiles become immovable with the increase of level number. Some vials may change the direction of substance movement. Filling the vials will give increase your score. The time is running, and you should do your job quickly.

meta.name: Magnatron
meta.desc: Aliens have begun a structured, methodical attack on the inner solar system while using the asteroid belt for cover and concealment. Earth calls into servicethe small fleet of building drones, defense forces and artificially intelligent Magentron device. The only chance is for the Magnetron to use the alien weapons against them. We can only hope it is skilled enough to defend us while we reposition our forces. Once Magnetron is gone, Mars is as good as gone.

meta.name: Major Motion
meta.desc: In Major Motion, The Draconian League have taken over the roads and made them dangerous for ordinary road users. You are in control of a car, driving up a vertically scrolling road with occasional forks in it, making the game similar to Spy Hunter. The car is mounted with guns, and so are many enemy cars, but cars can be rammed off the road as well as shot. Watch out for other enemy vehicles such as helicopters though; be sure to avoid their bullets. You can drive into the back of open lorries to gain upgraded weapons. Weapons are activated via keyboard presses, which makes the game more difficult than it would otherwise be. Sound and music sampled from suitably action-packed films aims to add to the atmosphere.

meta.name: Manchester United
meta.desc:
'The most famous club in the world' has had its problems in the League recently, but maybe you think you could do a better job, so here's your chance. As well as making managerial decisions you can even play for the entire team!
But before you get your boots on, there's a bit of managing to do via the icon-driven menu system. Of course, no amount of training will be enough for some old snoggers so they can be sold and new players bought via the transfer system.
Matches are viewed from side-on view. Both United and the opposition can be player or computer-controlled. Players dribble automatically and shoot when the fire button is released - the strength of kick determined by the time fire was held down. In addition you can chip the ball by pressing fire again quickly afterwards. Tackling is achieved either by running into the ball or by doing a sliding tackle. If mistimed the latter can lead to a free kick.
In terms of presentation you have easy-to-use menus with a fair amount of disk accessing. Graphics are okay apart from pastel colour scheme and 'skating' players. Sound represents appallingly annoying tune with a reasonable match FX. Gameplay is not that great since it is frustratingly difficult to score goals. Man Utd fans will enjoy the almost forgotten experience of winning the league. Like the team, strictly second division.

meta.name: Manchester United Europe
meta.desc: The first of Krisalis' football games based on the exploits of Manchester United is Manchester United Europe, a fun action football game. You can lead this popular club in major European tournaments, including the European Cup, European Cup Winners' Cup, and even the World Cup of Clubs. The Amiga game features excellent graphics and 4-player action via a joystick adapter. You can perform one-touch football and aftertouch tricks, and have full control over your goalkeeper's actions. Coaching options are limited but sufficient: you can make substitutions, see player punishments, and watch action replays. Manchester United Europe is great fun for casual football fans who are comfortable with their joystick skills, and has its own personality and style that deserves a closer look.

meta.name: Manchester United Premier League Champions
meta.desc: Manchester United: Premier League Champion es un juego de fútbol en Amiga. Seleccione su equipo favorito y participe en varios campeonatos nacionales y europeos.

meta.name: Manchester United : The Double
meta.desc:
This game is based on the wonderful '93-94 season of the English Premier League Championship. Which is, of course, the year when Manchester United won both the English league and FA cup in the same season. Hence Ã¢â‚¬Å“The DoubleÃ¢â‚¬Â in the name of the game. But don't let this fool you, you can choose to play any team from the top 5 leagues of the English game. Also you can customize any team or player in the league to fit your liking. Not that it gets any better than Keane, Giggs and Cantona though...
The statistical side if the game is impressive, as is the tactical. Both are quite simple and straight-forward, but still lets an advanced manager fiddle around a lot. You choose formation, players, arrange transfers and of course play games.
The matches are similar to what it looks and feels like in Kick Off 3 or even Sensible soccer. Graphics are OK but not more, the sound actually has some crowd noises and chants. If you listen closely you'll hear: Ã¢â‚¬Å“United, UnitedÃ¢â‚¬Â. Not surprising perhaps but it does make the matches more lively.
Controls during the games are good, but it's quite hard to score in your first games. Keep going though and you'll find that it can be done, but you'll hardly get many Ã¢â‚¬Å“crazyÃ¢â‚¬Â results against top-level opposition. The heading of the ball is a bit strange as the players look to jump about 5 meters up in the air, and have a hang-time that would make Michael Jordan jealous.
This was the third in Krisalis series of United games, it's also the best in my opinion. Not a true classic but you can challenge a friend or have some tough games anyway. Fighting your way through the friendlies, cups and leagues with your favourite team is really fun. A recommended download for anyone that enjoys football games.

meta.name: The Man from the Council
meta.desc: The Man from the Council is a very rare top-down shooter for the Commodore Amiga that scrolls in multiple directions and takes the player into an action-packed world. In this multi-scrolling shooter, the player takes control of a character who must fight through numerous levels while being attacked by enemies from all sides. The gameplay of The Man from the Council is reminiscent of classic top-down shooters, where quick reactions and precise aiming are essential. The player moves in all directions, dodging enemy attacks and shooting their way through waves of enemies. The game challenges the player by constantly throwing new threats at them, which keeps things tense.

meta.name: Manhattan Dealers
meta.desc: Operation: Cleanstreets is an Action game, developed by Silmarils and published by Broderbund,  which was released in 1988.

meta.name: Manhunter 2 : San Francisco
meta.desc:
Inmediatamente después del primer episodio, el jugador aterriza su nave robada en San Francisco tras intentar sin éxito localizar al enigmático asesino en serie Phil. Sin otra opción, el jugador asume la identidad de un Manhunter local y resuelve más crímenes en nombre de los Orbs alienígenas mientras busca a Phil y trabaja para la resistencia humana local.
Manhunter 2 presenta la misma decadencia urbana y el mismo régimen opresivo de invasores alienígenas que el juego original, esta vez utilizando las calles y lugares emblemáticos de la Bay Area. El puente Golden Gate, la torre Coit, la prisión de Alcatraz y la pirámide TransAmerica han sido transformados por los alienígenas. Nuevos rompecabezas, nuevos personajes y nuevas investigaciones esperan al jugador mientras sigue la pista de Phil a través de su serie de cadáveres estrangulados.

meta.name: Manhunter : New York
meta.desc: La Tierra ha sido invadida por la Alianza Orb y se ha introducido un régimen muy estricto para los humanos que quedan. La única vestimenta permitida es la túnica marrón de monje, hablar es un delito capital y a todos los humanos se les ha instalado un chip que registra todos sus movimientos. Para localizar a los criminales, los Orbs reclutan "cazadores de hombres", humanos con acceso a tecnología avanzada que han sido seleccionados para ser policías y cazarrecompensas. El jugador controla a uno de estos cazadores. Descubre una conspiración que se está gestando en las ruinas de Nueva York y un misterioso asesino en serie que anda suelto...

meta.name: Maniac Mansion
meta.desc:
La Mansión Edison siempre ha sido una vieja y espeluznante casa en las afueras de la ciudad. Hay rumores de experimentos extraños y criaturas extrañas que viven entre la familia Edison. Incluso se cuenta que un meteorito se estrelló cerca de la casa hace casi 20 años. Más recientemente, una chica llamada Sandy ha desaparecido del instituto local y su novio Dave jura que vio al Dr. Fred llevársela. Dave sabe que no puede hacerlo solo y que necesitará la ayuda de otros dos estudiantes si quiere tener alguna esperanza de infiltrarse en la mansión y salvar a Sandy.
nnLos jugadores comienzan eligiendo a dos estudiantes para acompañar a Dave a la mansión Edison, y luego pueden cambiar entre los dos personajes a voluntad. La mayoría de las acciones se realizan seleccionando verbos en la pantalla y aplicándolos a un objeto. Cada personaje conserva una personalidad distinta y puede tener una forma de resolver un problema diferente a la de sus compañeros.

meta.name: Maniax
meta.desc: Maniax is an Amiga tron arcade game released in 1989 by Kingsoft.

meta.name: Manic Miner
meta.desc: Juegas el papel de Miner Willy, un audaz explorador y aventurero. Descubre una red de cavernas subterráneas utilizadas por una civilización avanzada pero extinta, y se da cuenta de que las minas contienen minerales de metal muy valiosos. A través de 20 cavernas, debes recolectar todos los tesoros antes de que se acabe el tiempo (aire), vigilando a los desagradables guardianes, los obstáculos, las caídas, las arenas movedizas y todos los elementos que se encuentran en un clásico juego de plataformas.

meta.name: Manix
meta.desc:
It's a world gone mad! Bombs drop from the sky, playing havoc with the natural order of fat Filbert's verdant land. Filbert's got to see to it that every square foot is set back to normal - that's a lot of work for our rotund hero. The trouble is, bombs keep on coming, spikes, acid and ninja balls keep interfering and there's not much time left to get the job done. Fear not Filbert! Throw the tin cans, pick up the potions, drink the tea ond you may just manage to clear up the situation. And don't forget, if the going gets too tough you can enlist the help of a friend and work as a team - just try not to get in each other's way!
- 128 isometric 3D screens of manic action.
- Avoid the bullying red Vikings, trees, robots and nasty ninjas
- Simultaneous two player option.
- Customise your own games.
- 3 different game modes - competition, puzzle & the real thing.
- 10 different musical soundtracks.

meta.name: Marblelous
meta.desc: In Marblelous on Amiga you have control of a sphere on 2D boards and you will have to collect the keys corresponding to the colored doors to be able to pass. But watch out for the arrows on the ground and other traps...

meta.name: Maria's X-mas Box
meta.desc:
In this game, you play Strip poker against Maria Whittaker, an UK model of the 1980s. As the name suggests, she is first wearing a Santa Claus suit and does not get completely naked like in previous games of this type.
The gameplay is very similar to Ancos older game Strip Poker II+. In the game itself you can raise bets and can trade each cloth part for 100 credits if you are running out of cash and your hand is too good to not raise. There are two different difficulty levels, "Easy" and "Hard". The AI does sometimes bluffing with aggressive bets.

meta.name: Marvin's Marvellous Adventure
meta.desc:
Marvin, uno de los más grandes plataformas de Amiga, tiene aproximadamente 60 niveles por los que luchar. Hay estrellas que recoger, vidas extra que ofrecer, toboganes, tubos, escaleras, orugas que atravesar y fruta extra que recoger.
Los niveles están habitados por enemigos típicos, algunos de los cuales mueren al saltar sobre sus cabezas, mientras que otros deben ser pateados o disparados (una vez que recoges un arma).

meta.name: Match of the Day
meta.desc: There was a massive wave of football management games in 1992, and this was Zeppelin's contender. It was licensed around the BBC's football highlights programme famed for its classic theme music. The standard options exist (such as training, transfers and tactics) but the control system is unique. A diary is presented on the table, and you have to drag the icons for the activities you want to focus that amount of time on. This not only makes the presentation and style unusual, but also accurately represents the limited amount of time a real manager has.

meta.name: Math Wizard
meta.desc: Math Wizard is an educational game for the Commodore Amiga that focuses on teaching mathematical skills. Designed as an educational tool, the game is aimed primarily at younger players or anyone who wants to improve their mathematical skills in a fun way. It offers a variety of mathematical problems presented in a variety of ways to make learning both fun and educational.

meta.name: Matrix Marauders
meta.desc: Matrix Marauders is a racing game set in the future. The player takes part in the ultimate racing championship and, well, races against other cars and tries to be the first at the goal. All cars are equipped with weapons which can be used to destroy the opposition. Other things to keep in mind are holes on the track which need to be jumped over and power ups which offer advantages when picked up, e.g. more speed. Permission to start at the next race is only given if the player finishes the race among the first three. Between races the car and its weapon system can be upgraded.

meta.name: MAX Rally
meta.desc:
Car racing games have always been a favourite on the Amiga, especially top-down racers where you can take on your mates. MAX Rally hopes to build on the playability and graphic appeal of previous classics such as Skidmarks and Micro Machines and bring the whole genre up to date.
As well as being able to play against up to four human players, various other racing modes are available, including racing against computer cars, racing against the clock or participating in a Championship or Max Challenge. There are twenty different tracks and four different types of terrain (Woodland, Cosmic, Alpine and Dunes) to be negotiated.
Link up games are also possible, so you can play two player split-screen, two player link up or four player split-screen link up. If you don't have two Amigas to stick together you can play in a battle mode where the slowest cars are eliminated as they fall off the screen.
MAX Rally fails to inspire. It's fun for a little while, in a sub-Skidmarks sort of way, but the computer opponents are too easy and the multiplayer mode isn't imaginative enough to retain interest for long. It's like the original Micro Machines, only half a decade late. Five years ago, maybe.

meta.name: Fétiche Maya, Le
meta.desc:
As an intrepid explorer, buy equipments, tools. and head into the wild Yucatan jungles to find the mysterious Mayan fetish. 
Two modes are available: a platform mode and a 3D mode where the player drives a Jeep.

meta.name: Mean Arenas
meta.desc:
You have entered a game show where you need to collect all gold coins scattered throughout the 22 arenas in order to enter the next one. There are four types of arenas: "Robo Zones", "Dungeon Zones", "Rainbow Zones", and "Starship Zones". Besides the gold coins, each arena is filled with monsters, hazards, and weapons which you must look out for. Use the map to help you locate these.
As you progress through the arenas, there are new challenges which you must face such as multi-level arenas, locked doors and passages, slippery surfaces, and much more. Also scattered throughout the arenas is the letter "B", which when collected will award you a letter that make up the word CREDIT. When you have formed the word, you will be awarded an extra credit. Besides the standard arenas, there are also speed arenas, which are more difficult than the others. The object of these arenas is to get past more obstacles and gather as many coins as you can before the time expires.
In each arena, you will receive messages from time to time, as well as a password, which you can enter to resume that game from that arena.

meta.name: Mean Machine
meta.desc: Mean Machine is a racing and combat video game for the Commodore Amiga that offers an exciting mix of fast-paced car racing and intense vehicular combat. In this game, players not only compete in speed duels, but also battle their opponents with armed cars to reach the finish line as the winner. The gameplay of Mean Machine is similar to that of Pro Powerboat Simulator, but it moves the action from water to the road. Players control various armed vehicles and must not only set fast lap times, but also incapacitate their opponents using weapons and special equipment.

meta.name: Mean Streets
meta.desc:
Private detective Tex Murphy is hired to investigate the murder of a university professor. It turns out that he was one of eight scientists involved in Project Overlord, a mission to remotely control people. Tex soon learns of the deaths of other related figures. Suspects may include the British intelligence head, a surveillance company owner, and the professor's daughter.
Tex's first adventure takes the player through the seedy West Coast world of 2033, a setting that combines futuristic elements with film noir and "hardboiled" detective fiction styles. The game's main adventure portions are icon-driven, with object puzzles less significant than detective deduction and character interaction. Characters are represented by digitized photos.

meta.name: Megablast
meta.desc: Megablast is based on simple rules made famous by games like Dynablaster or Bomberman. Players are in a labyrinth and have bombs to eliminate enemies. Walls hinder movement but are often not explosion-proof, so the path can be blasted open. Hidden bonuses like increased firepower or additional bombs can appear. Bombs explode with a delay, so you need to be careful when placing them to avoid accidentally getting hit yourself. New features like flying bombs and surprise bonuses expand the strategy, with bonuses having positive or negative effects.

meta.name: Mega lo Mania
meta.desc:
Primero eliges uno de los cuatro personajes diferentes para que te represente, Scarlet (ejército rojo), Oberon (ejército amarillo), Caesar (ejército verde) o Madcap (ejército azul). El juego se divide en 10 niveles: los primeros 9 son grupos de 3 territorios que se pueden completar en cualquier orden, mientras que la 'Madre de todas las batallas' final tiene sus propias sorpresas.
Empiezas con 100 hombres y puedes usar la cantidad que creas necesaria en cada isla. El resto de hombres que quedan pasarán a otro nivel con otros 100 nuevos. En la segunda mitad del juego, puedes congelar a los hombres y guardarlos para la Madre de todas las batallas. Una vez que seleccione su isla y el lugar para su cuartel general, debe investigar para obtener mejores armas y defensas. Encima de los edificios puedes poner defensas como arqueros, pistoleros, hombres de aceite hirviendo y más tarde incluso torretas láser.

meta.name: Mega Motion
meta.desc:
Mega Motion is a puzzle game where the player has to move a number of balls across the screen towards an exit. The balls are linked together with one acting as an anchor the others are constantly rotating around. The game is played with the mouse. By clicking on one of the balls it becomes the anchor that the others rotate around. Clicking with the right mouse button changes the direction of the rotation.
Each level has obstacles that block the balls' path and objects that can be collected. Most common are blocks that are destroyed after being hit by a ball a couple of times but there are also those obstacles that destroy the ball that hits them. There are also bombs, which set off chain reactions when hit, and switcher blocks that reveal hidden doors or open up new passages. When all balls but one have been destroyed a life is lost and the level has to be restarted. Each level also has a time limit. Overstepping it is allowed but the player will then get a lower score. 
The game has a total of 100 levels that are divided into four categories: easy, average, difficult and very difficult. For every level completed the player is given a password.

meta.name: Mega Phoenix
meta.desc:
Tendremos que defendernos y destruir a una especie de pájaros espaciales con muy mala espina que harán lo imposible para borrarnos de la galaxia. Para lograr nuestro cometido contamos con la ayuda de nuestra nave ubicada en la parte inferior de la pantalla y con la cual podremos disparar y movernos en forma horizontal para esquivar a nuestros enemigos.
Por suerte además de poder disparar con nuestro láser, contamos con la ayuda de un escudo que nos hará indestructibles temporalmente, y que aunque no sea infinito, nos permitirá salir de aprietos en más de una ocasión.

meta.name: MegaTraveller 1 : The Zhodani Conspiracy
meta.desc:
Life in the 51st century it rougher than ever. Mankind, now under the rule of the Third Imperium, has realised his dream to reach into the stars, and has made contact with all manner of weird and wonderful alien life-forms for his trouble.
The most alarming of these extra-terrestrial contacts, made in 5018, was with a virtually identical race known as the Zhodani. The contact was not a pleasant one, however, and the first of four Frontier Wars soon broke out between the two races.
You'd think that after four bouts of inter-stellar genocide the two sides would have had enough, but, for reasons best known to themselves, a group of corrupt officials within the Imperium is preparing to start a fifth Ã¢â‚¬â€œ and, as always, there's only one person that can stop them.

meta.name: Mega Twins
meta.desc: El juego presenta a dos gemelos que intentan recuperar el control de su tierra, Alurea, tras el inesperado ataque de un monstruo que destruye todo a su paso. Los habitantes de Alurea han vivido en paz durante mil años y han olvidado cómo luchar. Los únicos supervivientes del país, los hijos gemelos del rey, deben enfrentarse al desafío y devolver a su reino su antigua gloria. Los dos gemelos, de unos 15 años en la época del juego, se aventuran en busca de una piedra legendaria conocida como el "Dragon Blue Eyes", de la que se dice que puede volver a poner todo en orden.

meta.name: Menace
meta.desc: Seis dictadores despiadados han colaborado para crear el planeta Draconia, que contiene algunas de las formas de vida más espantosas y dañinas imaginables, todas ellas complaciéndose en acciones bastante desagradables. Por lo tanto, debes ir en tu nave espacial a destruirlos a todos. El juego es un shoot 'em up de desplazamiento lateral influenciado por R-Type que consta de seis niveles visualmente diversos. Oleadas de enemigos se acercan a ti para ser derribados y revelan fichas, que al ser disparadas, rotarán a través de varias armas disponibles. Estas incluyen láseres, cañones, potencia mejorada de la nave y un escudo.

meta.name: Mercenary III : The Dion Crisis
meta.desc:
In this third part of the Mercenary series you have to enlarge your previous success by getting as much money as you can within 24 hours. To do this you visit the locations of that solar system with either some public transport, or you also can find your old star glider. There is also a teleportation system, which speeds things up. Initially you are struck by the size of the accessible area, but eventually you explore the area and you find single tasks, the completion of which
brings you money.
The buildings are nicely constructed, although a bit distant from each other, so there are large areas of nothing, but on the other hand you don't need to walk between them. Unlike in other adventures there's not only one way to complete the game, so your chances of solving it is increased significantly. The graphics are reasonably fast on a powerful Amiga, so it's really fun to play it if you get into it. The position of your game can be saved every time on one of the 10 slots.
As far as gameplay goes though, it's a winner. Perhaps a bit too slow moving for hard-bitten arcade fans, but for those who like to ponder over problems rather than leaping in feet first all guns blazing, it's the closest you're going to get to virtual reality on your Amiga. And it's a damn sight more interesting as well. A large, bulging sack of gorgeousness.

meta.name: Mercenary : Compendium Edition
meta.desc:
Due to an engine malfunction, your spaceship crashes on the planet Targ. Unlike your trusty vessel, you survive the crash and now have to find a way to get away from this planet. But hey, while you're at it, you might as well try to get some money off your unplanned stay on Targ.
You're a mercenary, and it just so happens that the two races on the planet are at war. So why not use that to your advantage and do some favors for each race... against cash?
You play this game in a first-person perspective with vector graphics. There's a huge planet for you to explore, you can walk around on it or take airborne vehicles to reach elevated locations.

meta.name: Metal Mutant
meta.desc: Metal Mutant es la definitiva maquina de batalla del futuro, enviada al planeta Kronox para buscar y destruir al tirano AROD 7. Tu puedes transformarte en cualquier momento en tres formas robóticas diferentes: humanoide, dinosaurio y tanque. Esto te da una gran cantidad movimientos de combate. No sólo luchas con uñas y dientes: tienes dientes, garras, misiles, hachas, cuerdas, un escudo, torpedos, un ordenador de batalla y un robot volador a distancia.

meta.name: Metal Warrior
meta.desc: This action/adventure platform game is set in the dystopian year 2010, where mindless pop culture dominates and free-spirited art is considered a rebellious act. You take on the role of a heavy metal singer who is the only survivor of a suspicious accident involving his band's tour bus. Metal bands are increasingly under attack, and it's up to the player to survive on the dangerous streets, uncover the background of the incidents, and bring the truth to light. An inventory system allows you to collect weapons and useful items that can be used during action sequences or when solving puzzles. You can interact with other characters, collect clues, and trade items. Additionally, as a singer, you must learn to play the guitar by practicing techniques and mastering songs, which is crucial to your success.

meta.name: Mickey Mouse : The Computer Game
meta.desc:
You know that castle thingy that you see on the titles of The Wonderful World of Disney, the one that looks all peaceful an' everythin'? Well, all is not as it seems. Inside the tower Mickey is fighting for peace, justice and the American way.
Merlin the magician has had his magic wand stolen by the evil Ogre King. The wand has been split into four pieces and given to witches at the top of the towers in the castle. The ogre has put ghosties and ghoulies and things in the towers to try and stop you from getting the wand back together, but you are armed with a squirt gun and a hammer to deal with them. Eventually you just seal up the doors and stop them from emerging. This is done by entering a series of sub-games: The Puddle Maze, The bubble Machine, The Pump Room and The Dripping Taps. At the top of each tower is a guardian thingie that must be shot in the head to retrieve a piece of the wand.
In my experience, cartoon character licences very rarely make good computer games, but I'm glad to say that the most famous of them all has managed to keep his reputation by spawning a cracker of a game. The graphics are nicely detailed and coloured, the ghostly music is more funny than spooky, creating exactly the right atmosphere to suit the already amusing gameplay - smacking teddy bears over the head is great fun.

meta.name: Mickey's ABC's : A Day at the Fair
meta.desc: Mickey's ABC's: A Day at the Fair is an educational game for pre-schoolers, aimed to familiarize them with the alphabet. The game is a licensed product featuring Mickey Mouse and other Disney characters. The player has the choice between two scenarios, Mickey's home and the fair. In each of those, Mickey can perform 26 actions; each representing a letter from the alphabet. For example, if the letter "i" is pressed at the fair, Mickey eats ice cream.

meta.name: Mickey Puzzles Animes
meta.desc: Mickey's Jigsaw Puzzles, also known as Mickey: Puzzles Animes in French, is a Puzzle Game was Released for Commodore Amiga and MS-DOS on 1991 and Developed by Novotrade and Published by Infogrames and Disney Interactive Studios in European Markets. The game starred Mickey Mouse and Guest Disney Character was Appear in the Pieces. It allows the player to select from among 15 different pictures of Mickey and friends. Players can select how many pieces should the jigsaw puzzle have to allow for many different skill levels of children. Once the puzzle is complete, the child is rewarded with some simple animation of the picture. Pictures can also be printed out to create a coloring book.

meta.name: Mickey's Memory Challenge
meta.desc: Mickey's Memory Challenge is a puzzle / educational game. It stars Mickey Mouse and several other Disney characters make guest appearances. The game itself is a simple but colorful matchmaker game. Eight upturned cards are presented to the player, who can only turn two at a time. The goal is to find the missing couple of every card.

meta.name: Micro Machines
meta.desc: Micro Machines es un juego de carreras clásico de los noventa. Sencillo, con un ritmo rápido y toneladas de diversión. Tienes el control de autos miniatura y tendrás que competir con los oponentes AI o con tus amigos en distintas locaciones tales como cocinas, mesas de billar, talleres, mesas de colegio, jardines, bañeras etc. La selección de autos es tan diversa como las locaciones: hay helicópteros, botes rápidos, autos de carreras, tanques, jeeps, formulas y muchos más vehículos para elegir.

meta.name: Greens : The Ultimate 3-D Golf Simulation
meta.desc:
Simulation experts MicroProse also wanted to enter this game genre Ã¢â‚¬â€œ their answer was a serious golf simulation using a 3D vector graphics engine usually found only on their flight sims - the game was called Greens: The Ultimate 3-D Golf Simulation (In North America or MicroProse Golf in the rest of the world).
Greens: The Ultimate 3-D Golf Simulation is full of options. A dozen game types can be played on six different courses by up to four human players. A handicap system is included to allow novices and experts to play together. In one player mode the 'ranking list' allows players to play head-to-head against computer opponents of varying skill and rise in the ranks.
Hitting the ball is done using same control system pioneered in Leaderboard and used in most golf games. First click on the mouse button starts the back swing, second sets the force and final click sets the snap.
Greens: The Ultimate 3-D Golf Simulation is a great golf simulation for the Amiga. Its system requirements are modest meaning even A500 owners will be able to play it properly. Like other golf sims it's appeal is limited to fans of this genre, but for those looking for a good, challenging sports simulation, they could do much worse than selecting this golf game from the flight simulation experts.

meta.name: MicroProse Soccer
meta.desc: Juego de fútbol arcade con dos modos: Indoor y Outdoor. Outdoor: fútbol europeo normal. Partidos sueltos, liga o torneo (mundial). Extras: efectos climáticos, repeticiones, duración a medida. Movimientos y tiros divertidos (ej. centros banana). Indoor: equipos USA en campo diminuto y reglas propias. Partidos, liga y All Star. Mismos trucos, con efectos aún más locos (ej. tiro banana rebota en la pared y gol).

meta.name: Midnight Resistance
meta.desc:
Los luchadores de Midnight Resistance se enfrentan al tremendo poder del científico loco King Crimson y su Crimson Corps. Crimson ha secuestrado a tu abuelo científico y a otros cinco familiares, y planea usar sus avanzados inventos para el mal.
Controlas a un combatiente de la Resistencia en este shoot 'em up con scroll de nueve niveles con plataformas, cada uno con un jefe final. Los enemigos vienen a pie o en vehículos, y Crimson ha colocado nidos de ametralladora por el camino.
Los enemigos abatidos sueltan llaves que puedes canjear en tiendas por armas: metralletas, lanzallamas... La munición hay que comprarla y si se te acaba, pierdes el arma. El control es peculiar: disparas en cualquier dirección y puedes arrastrarte por salientes bajos.

meta.name: Midwinter II : Flames of Freedom
meta.desc: Segunda parte de Midwinter, aquí la historia continúa unos años después del final del primero, una vez concluido el invierno nuclear. Eres miembro de una organización conocida como COBRA que trabaja para liberar una serie de 40 islas tropicales del opresivo Imperio Sahariano, que controla el continente africano. Para ello deberás reclutar a diversos líderes de la resistencia, recurrir al asesinato sin contemplaciones o quizá sabotear instalaciones del mencionado imperio para granjearte el apoyo de la gente y que se unan a tu causa.

meta.name: MiG-29 Fulcrum
meta.desc:
One of the most powerful Soviet fighters, the Fulcrum has gone from Russian threat to star performer at Farnborough to Iraqi menace. Domark's sim puts you in the cockpit of a MiG in Soviet service, from pilot's school to combat. Sadly there's no sim to pit the MiG against the USAF or RAF, but five combat missions take in photo-reconnaissance in the Arctic, air-to-air combat over China, strafing terrorist trucks, a bombing raid against oil installations and destroying a nuclear reactor. The latter is the final mission (requiring 500 points to enter) which involves taking out air defences and landing on a runway to rearm.
As you'd expect there's a savable pilot's service record but sadly no weapons selection Ã¢â‚¬â€œ you always fly with the same mix of cannon, unguided rockets plus air-to-ground and air-to-air missiles.

meta.name: MiG-29M Super Fulcrum
meta.desc:
A great update of Simis/Domark's underrated flight sim MiG-29 Fulcrum. While essentially the same game (with the same campaigns and planes), Super Fulcrum improves on the outstanding predecessor in every respect, the most significant being graphics upgrade and more varied terrain, instead of the mostly flat ground in MiG-29 Fulcrum, Super Fulcrum sports entire mountain ranges and more ground features. In contrast to only one loadout in the previous game, Super Fulcrum offers three: air to ground, air to air, and a mix of both.
The great flight dynamics that Simis is famous for is intact, with even more tweaks to the engine to make the game more realistic. In short, if you like MiG-29 Fulcrum, you'll love Super Fulcrum.

meta.name: MiG-29 Soviet Fighter
meta.desc: La comparación más cercana a este juego de aviones sería Afterburner. El ángulo de visión se sitúa ligeramente detrás de tu avión, que debe disparar a los aviones, tanques e instalaciones enemigas mientras evita su fuego. Está armado con diferentes tipos de armas, incluyendo bombas de lanzamiento, misiles aire-aire y una bomba nuclear. Puedes recoger más recogiendo los paracaídas que caen en tu camino. Hay cadenas montañosas, desiertos y etapas árticas que atravesar en el camino, con grandes boss a los que enfrentarse.

meta.name: Might and Magic II : Gates to Another World
meta.desc: La secuela de la exitosa Might and Magic I, se jactó mejores gráficos, un mundo más grande, pero aun asi sigue siendo más o menos el mismo motor de juego y presentación. Embárcate en un viaje glorioso y salva el mundo de CRON y de ti mismo. Un equipo equilibrado es una necesidad en este juego. Hay varias ubicaciones y elementos que están restringidos a ciertos géneros, alineaciones o razas. Un equipo compuesto por buenos hombres humanos no te llevará muy lejos. El tiempo juega un papel importante en este juego. El viaje en el tiempo es parte de él, pero en un nivel más básico, encontrarás que los personajes envejecen a medida que avanza el juego. Si esperas demasiado, las estadísticas de tus personajes cambiarán para reflejar su envejecimiento.

meta.name: Might and Magic III : Isles of Terra
meta.desc: A party of brave heroes managed to defeat the corrupted guardian Sheltem as he attempted to destroy the world of CRON. However, the great battle between the guardians Corak and Sheltem continued in another place - the world of Terra, where Sheltem was originally appointed as a guardian. Revolting against the powerful race of the Ancients, Sheltem takes possession of their space-traveling nacelles, hurling them at the suns of other planets. It is now up to a group of local adventurers to help Corak and vanquish Sheltem once and for all.

meta.name: Mighty Bomb Jack
meta.desc: Mighty Bomb Jack, la secuela del Bomb Jack original, aporta el desplazamiento lateral a la serie y lo acerca más a un juego de plataformas que al aspecto arcade/puzzle del primer juego. Una vez más, juegas como el superhéroe con capa hambriento de bombas. Recoge bombas para ganar puntos y evita que te golpeen los numerosos monstruos que surgen de las cajas y demás. El juego presenta ahora nuevos fondos, como nubes y bosques, además de los habituales fondos de esfinge y pirámide del título original.

meta.name: Mike Read's Computer Pop Quiz
meta.desc:
BBC Radio 1 DJ Mike Read presented a pop music quiz show, which is recreated here with questions from the 50s to the 80s. You can play against the computer or another human; either way, select a specialist subject and 2 team-mate graphics (all representing white people). The overall style and presentation are very similar to Elite's earlier A Question of Sport license.
In the first round you select one of twelve random questions from the Jukebox, each of which has four options. A correct answer earns you two points, while an incorrect answer gives your opponent the chance to steal for one point. In round 2 you get three clues to name a star - you get three points for guessing from one clue, two points from two, and one point if you need all 3. In round three, choose an Easy question (from your category) for one point, or a Hard one (from someone else's) for two.
Round four asks you to Guess The Year that a set of events happened in, with scoring the same as round 2. Then comes the quickfire round - answer up to nine questions in 45 seconds, with a 2-second penalty for an incorrect answer. Finally, the six remaining Jukebox pictures are revealed and answered.

meta.name: Mikro Mortal Tennis
meta.desc:
As you can guess from the title, Mikro Mortal Tennis is basically founded on tennis game, but its goal is to eliminate your opponents, not simply to defeat them! To this purpose, players might make use of loads of Mortal-Kombat and Street-Fighter-like special moves, in addition to many others, directly taken from lots of famous videogames or films. Besides, there are bombs, Fire'n'forget rockets, heat-seeking missiles at their complete disposal... The game boasts an amusing animated intro which will explain the reason of such a strange tournament - by the way, your order is to climb a high mountain, just like the second episode of the Mortal Kombat saga; moreover, it features several victory and defeat pictures and an even more crazy final sequence than the intro!
Players can choose their characters from a range of twelve different guys, each distinguished with typical characteristics, which can be edited in the proper menu. Beyond every human conceiving, the game is spangled with lots of mad things, like referee-slaughtering, animals which will appear in the field, VIPs which will perform during the match, and a mysterious tapir named Fart (main character of the game, as you can be able to guess from the introduction) which will perform in a number of funny anims. At the beginning of the match the players will enter the field and choose the field in which play with an incredible money trowing!
Of course, the sporting side of the game is not to be underestimated. You'll always have to win your match! From this point of view, the game is classically structured: pitch type, number of sets to win, type of game (single, double or training), as well as the type of tournament to join; you'll be able to select, in addition to the above-mentioned MK-style tournament, an UNFRIENDLY tournament in which up to eight human players are allowed to take part, or a full season, where player will have to win as much as possible to travel all over the world, and in order to buy weapons and points which will help him in his short career. It's possible to save and subsequently restore your season from disc as well as every change made in the players editing menu, where you're able to change the name, the characteristics and the shirt colour of all the characters... Well, that's all, there's nothing left but wishing you to enjoy Mikro Mortal Tennis! Mikro Mortal Tennis supports all Amiga models with at least 1 Meg of Ram.

meta.name: Millennium 2.2
meta.desc: Millennium: Return to Earth is the forerunner to Deuteros: The Next Millennium and has a premise similar to Sierra's Outpost. Set in the 22nd century, the Earth has been destroyed, and the player's mission is to re-establish human colonization of other worlds, beginning with just one outpost and a few hundred survivors on the moon. Success requires maintaining life support, mining and producing resources for more colonies, and defense against a powerful alien race bent on humanity's destruction.

meta.name: Millennium 2.2
meta.desc: Millennium: Return to Earth is the forerunner to Deuteros: The Next Millennium and has a premise similar to Sierra's Outpost. Set in the 22nd century, the Earth has been destroyed, and the player's mission is to re-establish human colonization of other worlds, beginning with just one outpost and a few hundred survivors on the moon. Success requires maintaining life support, mining and producing resources for more colonies, and defense against a powerful alien race bent on humanity's destruction.

meta.name: Mindbender
meta.desc: Mindbender uses similar gameplay principles to Deflektor, which means that you have indirect control over a beam of light. On each of the 50 levels you must guide it from a starting point to an ending point, taking out all the enemies along the way. Rotating each of the many mirrors on the level to send the beam onto the points the enemies hover over does this – reaching many of them will involve several attempts at finding the right combination of angles. Rotating barriers, light bulb switches and locked sections must all be taken into account, but there are also magic balloons later on. All this must be done within a time limit, and directing the beam back into itself causes overloads and must be avoided, Tron-style.

meta.name: Mindfighter
meta.desc:
El juego está ambientado en un mundo postapocalíptico en el que los guardias intentan desesperadamente mantener el orden frente a turbas de matones modificados genéticamente, utilizando ampliamente la pena de muerte.
Robin, un psíquico de 11 años teletransportado al pasado antes de la tragedia, debe aprender a sobrevivir y alimentarse adecuadamente, y finalmente infiltrarse en este despiadado estado policial.
Los encuentros con otros personajes son frecuentes, y algunos de ellos conservan una apariencia de humanidad. Por ejemplo, hay que convencer a Daryl, Alison y Matthew para que hagan lo que tú quieres. Examinar objetos suele dar pocas pistas, por lo que los detalles del manual son esenciales.

meta.name: Mind-Roll
meta.desc: In Mind-Roll you play a rolling eyeball in an attempt to find your way through numerous mazes. Each maze features different puzzles to solve and objects such as keys to collect in order to find the destination. There is a limited amount of time to solve each maze.

meta.name: Mindshadow
meta.desc:
En esta aventura de texto ilustrada, encarnas a un amnésico. Aquí estás, volviendo en ti, en una isla tropical desconocida, en un momento indeterminado, con la tarea de encontrar la manera de salir mientras intentas responder a las primeras preguntas que naturalmente te vienen a la mente: ¿quién eres, cómo has acabado aquí y qué ha podido hacer que pierdas la memoria?
Tendrás que introducir tus instrucciones en modo texto, por ejemplo, teclear la inicial de uno de los cuatro puntos cardinales te permitirá moverte, "I" te dará tu inventario (limitado a 8 objetos). Comandos como EXAMINE o LOOK AT te ayudarán a conocer tu entorno, el comando THINK te permitirá meditar sobre todos tus descubrimientos. Tendrás que intentar reunir tus recuerdos, y así recomponer el puzzle de tu identidad.

meta.name: Mind Walker
meta.desc: A mentally disturbed professor must enter his own brain to repair it, changing into different forms to overcome the obstacles and puzzles. The aim of the first level was to connect a path from a certain location to a specific crystal in the brain by using the correct avatars with the correct landscape type, all the while defending against hostile enemies (that decreased in frequency as the player approached the destination). In the second level, the player had to guide the avatar around a maze full of pulsing neurons to locate a pyramidal Ã¢â‚¬Å“shard of sanityÃ¢â‚¬Â using audio cues. Touching a neuron while it pulsed meant instant death, so good timing was required to collect the pyramid and return to the neuron-surrounded exit. The last stage required the player to complete a Rorschach-inspired colour-cycling puzzle in order to replace the shard. The levels looped several times before the restoration of the physicistÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s sanity.

meta.name: Mini Golf
meta.desc: Hay cinco campos completos de 18 hoyos con diferentes temas, incluido un campo tutorial que guía al jugador a través de todos los aspectos del juego, un campo clásico que sigue el patrón del campo de minigolf tradicional básico, un campo intermedio que agrega más obstáculos, elevaciones y dificultad, un Fantasy Course aventurero con diseños que van desde castillos hasta pinball y el Expert Course para aquellos que dominan el juego.

meta.name: Mini Golf Plus
meta.desc: Mini Golf Plus is a mini golf game with 18 holes. The course is based on a real mini golf location, but features a few additional gimmicks like a crocodile which tries to snatch the ball. The game is controlled with the mouse: for every hit, the player sets the direction by putting a cursor somewhere on the course. However, this is only viable in a certain radius around the ball. The hit is performed with the left mouse button and the strength depends on how long it is hold. The main playing window is in a top-down perspective, but there's also a smaller window with a 3D perspective for better orientation.

meta.name: Minskies - The Abduction
meta.desc: Minskies Furballs no es un port, sino un clon espiritual de Puyo Puyo. En un torneo contra un elenco de locos personajes debes guiar y rotar parejas de gatos de diferentes colores que caen para formar combinaciones de colores. Cuando cuatro o más gatos hacen contacto, son eliminados y los de arriba caen, lo que posiblemente desencadene una reacción en cadena.
