meta.desc: The Toyottes is a really fun looking game, but unfortunately, the graphics are the best thing about it. Quite humorous graphics can draw you into the game. An average use of colour, but the backdrops are pretty bland. Couple this with lots going on, and you get a very confusing play. Also some good music, with a good variety of sound effects during the game. Overall, they add to the humour of the graphics quite well. The basic idea is pretty good, and fighting the various monsters is quite fun, but once you've seen most of the screens and baddies the game loses its addictiveness and appeal. As far as platform games go, Toyottes isn't that great and not really something I can recommend.

meta.name: T-racer
meta.desc: T-Racer es un juego de disparos de desplazamiento lateral en 2D. Escrito para la línea de computadoras Amiga completamente en Assembly 68000. Técnicamente, ofrecía lo mejor que existía en ese momento: desplazamiento de paralaje de múltiples capas, cientos de colores en pantalla, docenas de BOB (Objetos Blitter o sprite, para no-Amigans) , desplazamiento extremadamente fluido. Llámame anticuado, pero estoy en ello por los efectos: las explosiones son buenas, y el último 'nivel azul' parece realmente impactante. La música es buena. En general: difícil, algo interesante.

meta.name: Tracker
meta.desc:
Tracker is a mouse-controlled vector-graphics 3D strategy game depicting an ultra-violent TV show of the future. As a contestant, the player's mission is to be the first to ever complete it successfully. The task involves commanding a fleet of Skimmers charged with destroying various groups of combat vehicles, including Cycloids, Scouts and Defenders. Short and long-range scanners are available to aid in this.
The game takes place in a maze world containing a number of distinct sectors, each of which has its own type of enemy present. The Communication Centre powers the Cycloids, and are protected by the Defenders. Once these are taken out, the Centerpoint Sector must be destroyed to complete the level.

meta.name: Traders
meta.desc: A state-of-the-art strategy game for up to four players. In this fun and addictive trading game you must battle it out to gain economic supremacy on a distant planet. The proprietor, Fat-Mike, has an insatiable hunger for snails so keep him well-fed or you must face his wrath. Traders guarantees many hours of fun. Instructions and game (on screen) in English.

meta.name: Trained Assassin
meta.desc: The game puts the player in the role of a highly trained assassin who must fight through a variety of missions to eliminate dangerous targets. The gameplay of "Trained Assassin" is characterized by a mixture of fast-paced combat and tactical action. The player must find a balance between stealth and direct attack in various levels in order to be successful. The missions lead through differently designed environments, from urban settings to heavily guarded military facilities. Each environment presents the player with new challenges, be it heavily armed opponents or obstacles that must be skillfully overcome.

meta.name: Transarctica
meta.desc: El planeta Tierra está ahora cubierto de hielo porque una nube ha impedido que el sol brille con suficiente intensidad sobre la superficie. El ferrocarril se ha convertido en el único medio de comunicación y las ciudades están unidas entre sí por kilómetros de vías. Estás al frente de un convoy y tu misión es encontrar la forma de atravesar la capa de nubes. Para ello, tendrás que comerciar con las ciudades (compras militares, esclavos, armas y equipamiento). Después, los puzles te llevarán a zonas cada vez más difíciles. De vez en cuando, un tren se cruzará en tu camino y tendrás que enfrentarte a él...

meta.name: Traps 'n Treasures
meta.desc: La tripulación del capitán Jeremy Flynn ha sido secuestrada en el Caribe y debe aventurarse a través de 4 grandes niveles infestados de enemigos para recuperarlos. En el camino, puedes recolectar dinero de cofres del tesoro convenientemente ubicados, que se pueden gastar en varias tiendas para obtener armamento adicional.

meta.name: Treasures Of The Savage Frontier
meta.desc:
The Heroes of Ascore have been magically summoned to help old dwarven allies retake the city of Llorkh from the foul Zhentarim legions. After that, there are more dangers that lurk in the wilds of the Savage Frontier...
The sequel to Gateway to the Savage Frontier is a role-playing game using SSI's standard Gold Box gameplay system. You can import existing characters from playing the first game. The game is viewed from above, as you move your party into mystery, buildings and combat. The game now includes weather changes that affect movement and NPC interaction

meta.name: Treasure Trap
meta.desc: Treasure Trap is an isometric action game similar to Head Over Heels, but less abstract in its theme. The player guides the diver in a series of rooms (100 total) where the main goal is to collect gold. The main hazard encountered is the sea life that occupied the vacant ship. The character has no weapons, but carries a limited amount of "smart fishes", trained piranhas that attack and destroy all the enemies in the room.

meta.name: Trex Warrior : 22nd Century Gladiator
meta.desc:
In the 22nd Century, Gladiator battles are highly important. You are Trex Veteran Riano Bolor, and you must fight up to 5 Planets with 30 sundry enemies. You fight in your world and if you win you are the champion of your world and journeys to the next battle to fight and win for the champion.
If you win a battle you win credits to buy new equipment and weapons, which can also be sold on to pay towards improved kit. The degree of difficulty will higher and higher, as the enemies are increasingly skilled and well-equipped, and you must to plan your strategy to win the battle.

meta.name: TrianGO
meta.desc:
From the mists of antiquity, shrouded in the mysteries of the Orient, came the inspiration for a strategy game that could only be played...in the midst of galactic space!
Play with perfectly spherical stones of crystallized, colored gems on a hexagon-shaped field, formed by beams of pure-white light from diamond powered laser-beams.
Place your gemstones at the intersections of light. When three of your stones are correctly positioned, the stones resonate with the laser-light to form ideal triangles of shimmering color that control territory and capture your opponent's stones.
Play until your opponent cannot move and you win!
Play TrianGo against a friend or the computer. But beware, for instilled in the computer is the knowledge of Ancient Masters.

meta.name: Triple X
meta.desc: This is a journey into Time. In the blink of an eye you'll survey the giant labyrinth who's endless corridors extend even beyond into the distant future and past. What, but a keen strategical mind could ever hope to master the riddle of this amazing maze and outwit the guardians of its many treasures. Your quest will, however, become easier, as you gather new powers on your way. Furthermore your transporter is equipped with defences of its own. Including its very own time bomb, and believe me you'll need it cos' its like hell down here. Prepare for the multiple mysteries of Triple X.

meta.name: Trolls
meta.desc:
This platform game features the small blue-haired cutesy creatures that were popular around the time (although surely not with most computer game buyers?). You play a Troll roaming the levels in the hope of rescuing as many baby trolls as possible - each level gives you a set minimum to retrieve before you can leave via the Pigstop.
Initially you have no weapons, and contact with the nasties costs you energy, but a Yo-Yo can be collected, which can be used not only to kill enemies, but also to smash blocks away and open up paths, and even (with practice) tied to a ledge to allow you to swing across a gap. 
Throughout the levels you will find the letters B,O,N,U,S and G released from bonus balloons or on killing an enemy - if at the end of a level your letters spell out Bonus or Bogus you go to the appropriate extra level. The former has a chance to gain extra lives, the latter must be escaped quickly to avoid losing a life.

meta.name: Tube Warriors
meta.desc: Isn't life full of surprises? Last month, there was us thinking that Flair's Dangerous Streets had to be the last word in awesomely awful beat 'em-ups but no! Ã¢â‚¬â€ here comes Tube Warriors all set to make us rethink just how bad games can get. The big pity with Tube Warriors is that the basic engine for an excellent Street Fighter 2 clone Ã¢â‚¬â€ or even a perfect conversion of the coin-op itself Ã¢â‚¬â€ is in place. Trouble is, it's obvious that having written it the programmers have no idea what to do with it. The backdrops, for example, move as nicely as any in Street Fighter, with loads of top foreground and background parallax effects, but they're just so drab and unexciting to look at. Likewise, the fighters are poorly drawn (something of an understatement, to be honest) and stiffly animated, but they bounce around swiftly enough. Now I could live with ropey graphics if the gameplay was any good but, to be blunt, it's a mess. The joystick control is sheer crap; if you simply want to walk left and right you have to make the character take each step by tapping the joystick in the required direction, so you can imagine what a nightmare the combat moves are to pull off. There are many other things I could go on about Ã¢â‚¬â€ the crude presentation, the fact that you can't choose your character in one player mode, the duff sound Ã¢â‚¬â€ but I think you get the idea. I took this home to review over the weekend and even my girlfriend, who still thinks Space Invaders is advanced computer entertainment, recognised it as crap. Stay well away for fear of contamination.

meta.name: Turbo Out Run
meta.desc: La secuela de OutRun presenta un juego básico similar al original, con la acción vista desde detrás del auto, y el desafío es completar cada etapa dentro del límite de tiempo. El contacto puede hacer que el automóvil gire, disminuya la velocidad o incluso se voltee; en cada caso, perderás tiempo. Hay 16 escenarios en todo Estados Unidos, que se mueven gradualmente de este a oeste, todos representados de forma diferente visualmente. Después de cada 4 niveles, ingresa a la pantalla de una tienda, con una selección de actualizaciones. Como lo implica el título, ahora tiene instalado un turbo booster, que acelera el automóvil, aunque el uso excesivo puede provocar el sobrecalentamiento del motor y no se recarga hasta la sección de cada tienda. Usted tiene 5 continúes, y no completar el curso dentro del límite de tiempo le cuesta uno.

meta.name: Turbo Trax
meta.desc: Turbo Trax is a top-down racing game. The main game mode involves competing against five other competitors across a variety of different surfaced tracks such as dirt, racing circuit, ice and city. Each track has hazards such as oil slicks that will slow cars down, and turbo booster icons that will speed the car up when it's driven over. The player can collect money that is scattered around the tracks in order to buy tuned parts for their car. Before each race the car's setup can be adjusted for the conditions.

meta.name: Turn 'n' Burn
meta.desc: ¡Lánzate al shoot-'em-up espacial más emocionante de todos los tiempos! Necesitarás toda la potencia de fuego que tengas en esta extraña galaxia, donde peces voladores, cerebros incorpóreos, orugas gigantes y caras felices flotantes deambulan por las estrellas. Prepara tu botón de disparo: ¡la acción arcade no puede ser más intensa!

meta.name: Turrican 3
meta.desc:
En Turrican III para Amiga, te pones en la piel de Bren McGuire, la última esperanza para salvar al mundo del dominio de las máquinas.
Tendrás que abrirte paso por 15 niveles llenos de acción futurista, arrasando con todos los robots que se te crucen. Usa tus armas, saca partido de tu traje Turrican, recoge objetos para mejorarlo, ¡y ábrete camino hacia la libertad a base de latigazos de cuerda de plasma!

meta.name: Tusker
meta.desc:
Finding the mysterious Elephant's Graveyard in Africa was your Father's lifelong quest. When he disappears you are determined to find out what might have happened to him, and what secrets may lie within.
This side scrolling arcade adventure is split into three stages, taking in the harsh and barren desert, an underground network of caves, and a tough tribal jungle. The natives are hostile to your presence, and weaponry must be found to fend them off, although its use does little to put the natives at ease initially. The machete to cut through the jungle is equally important. At many other points you will need to use objects you have found along the way. The backgrounds are in full 3D and can serve to obscure the character when he is behind trees or rocks.

meta.name: TV Sports Baseball
meta.desc:
TV Sports: Baseball is an arcade oriented conversion of the popular American sport, in the same series as TV Sports: Football and TV Sports: Basketball. The player can choose among 26 teams and play directly in the positions of batter and pitcher. A managerial element is also included: when playing a whole season the player can choose the lineup and the batting order.
Emphasis is put on user-friendliness and TV-style presentation, featuring the likeness of Bob McGill. It also features digitalised sound samples and motion captured player animations. The stats can be consulted from the main menu.

meta.name: TV Sports Boxing
meta.desc: You play a rookie boxer trying to fight your way to the top. Fight bouts to win money, to pay for your training and manager. Ultimately fighting you way to the title "Champion".

meta.name: TV Sports Football
meta.desc: Before Electronic Arts sought to imitate television coverage of sports with their EA Sports titles, Cinemaware had the same idea, initially applying it to (American) Football. Cutscenes follow dramatic moments in the match, and each match is preceded by a TV-style introduction. The game is primarily action-based, although you also choose your plays before executing them. You then bring the passes and runs to life on the pitch itself. You can play single matches or full leagues, with any of the NFL teams of the time.

meta.name: Twintris
meta.desc: Excellent Tetris clone. It has six modes of gameplay for one or two players who progress through the difficulty levels. The player does not get bored with doing all the same all the time. Add to this tournament and cup modes and you get ultimate tetris which you can only dream about! Handling is smooth, graphics are OK, music is awe

meta.name: Twin Turbos
meta.desc: Welcome, spectators, to the final day of the 19th Annual Interplanetary Terra Race Meeting. As expected, the stadium is packed with excited fans awaiting the final race that will decide this year's Interplanetary Drivers' Championship. Now back to Murray in the studio... FEATURES: Six challenging race tracks that push driver and car to the very limits of endurance. Simultaneous two-player mode: Two independent, smooth-scrolling screens. Race against the clock or compete against a friend. Thrilling SONIC GRAFFITI soundtrack and TAU ZERO-level turbo intro music. Fast-paced, addictive gameplay!

meta.name: Twylyte
meta.desc: Twylyte is an arcade 3D shoot-'em-up in the style of Space Harrier and Backlash. The player continuously races towards the horizon at tremendous speed. There are indestructible barriers that the invisible ship must avoid, as well as enemies that shoot and fire missiles. The ship can be moved not only left and right, but also up and down, which gives more evasive options but makes aiming at enemies more difficult. The main goal is to obtain energy. When you are hit, you lose energy, and when your energy is too low, you can no longer shoot. Energy can be regenerated by green blocks and special sections. A radar shows upcoming objects. The graphics are made of polygons, optionally you can switch to wireframe graphics.

meta.name: Typhoon
meta.desc: Typhoon is a vertically scrolling shooter in which the player uses a space ship to kill aliens. The game has about 50 levels in changing environments, e.g. an asteroid belt, a jungle or a futuristic city. Special symbols, available at the beginning of each level, grant an extra life or one of three special upgrades (like a better weapon or a shield). The latter are only temporary. The game features two especially dangerous enemies: indestructible, rotating plates and skulls which grant instant death when shot. The game always shows how many points are missing before getting a better rank in the high score list.

meta.name: UFO : Enemy Unknown
meta.desc: En el año 1998, la cantidad de informes de avistamientos de ovnis aumentó drásticamente. Las historias sobre abducciones y ataques extraterrestres se generalizaron cada vez más. Finalmente, luego de que varias naciones del mundo no lograran interceptar los ovnis, sus representantes se reunieron en una conferencia de importancia mundial en Ginebra, Suiza. Finalmente se decidió organizar un grupo paramilitar secreto, denominado Unidad de Combate Extraterrestre (X-COM). Comenzando con una base, dos cazas, un transporte y algunos soldados, X-COM debe localizar a los alienígenas, conocer sus orígenes y tecnología, averiguar dónde está su base y destruirla.

meta.name: Ultima III : Exodus
meta.desc:
El tercer título de la serie Ultima, este fue el primer juego de la serie que contó con un grupo de aventureros en lugar de un solo jugador. También tenía ciudades grandes y detalladas con muchas personas con las que hablar, y un motor de combate separado donde tu grupo luchó contra múltiples monstruos en un sistema basado en turnos.
Después de la derrota del malvado mago Mondain y su amante Minax en las dos Ultimas, la paz ha regresado a la tierra de Sorsaria. El tiempo pasa y, finalmente, se producen alteraciones geológicas y un resurgimiento de la población de monstruos, y pronto se descubre que Mondain y Minax habían concebido un niño llamado "Exodus" antes de su muerte. Ahora ese niño se ha convertido en un adulto con el poder de vengar la muerte de sus padres. Obviamente, cae sobre ti el héroe para encontrarlo y detenerlo.

meta.name: Ultima IV : Quest of the Avatar
meta.desc:
En una hermosa tarde, te recuestas contra un árbol y dormitas, cuando de repente aparece una especie de puerta azul no muy lejos de ti, de la que caen una cruz Ankh, un mapa de tela y dos libros, uno que describe el mundo de Britannia, el otro que habla de magia. Al levantarte, observas un campamento de nómadas, que sorprendentemente no habías visto antes, y eres conducido al carro del adivino, que te hace una serie de preguntas, tras lo cual te desmayas. Y cuando despiertas, el mundo de Britannia está ante ti. ¿Podrás demostrar tu valía y ser digno de ser el Avatar de las Virtudes?
Ultima IV es un juego de arriba abajo, con la excepción de las mazmorras, que están en una vista en primera persona. Las fases de combate son por turnos. Britannia es un vasto mundo que puedes explorar a tu antojo.

meta.name: Ultima V : Warriors of Destiny
meta.desc:
Desde la desaparición de Lord British en una expedición a los confines de la Tierra, el mal ha vuelto a manifestarse, en forma de Señores de las Sombras. Aparecen en las ciudades, sembrando el pánico y apoderándose de las mentes de la gente. También han reaparecido orcos, trolls y demonios. No todo va bien, así que tus amigos de toda la vida te han llamado a ti, el Avatar, reflejo de todas las cualidades caballerescas, para que encuentres a Lord British y lo devuelvas a su trono. Todo lo que tienes que hacer es emprender una búsqueda, reclutar compañeros, interrogar a todo el mundo, explorar las mazmorras y luego irte a los confines de la Tierra, donde te espera lo desconocido.
Aunque el juego se desarrolla en el mismo mundo que Ultima IV, ahora está más detallado. El combate se ha mejorado ligeramente. El ciclo día/noche se utiliza juiciosamente, y los personajes que conoces tienen vida propia.

meta.name: Ultima VI : The False Prophet
meta.desc:
Varios años después de devolver a Lord British su legítima posición como monarca de Britannia, el Avatar es capturado por criaturas demoníacas y colocado en un altar de sacrificios. Sus amigos Lolo, Shamino y Dupre aparecen justo a tiempo para salvarle. En el castillo de Britannia, el Avatar se entera de que sus captores eran gárgolas, una raza de enigmáticas criaturas que recientemente han invadido Britannia y ocupado los santuarios de la Virtud. El Avatar se embarca en una búsqueda para liberar Britannia.
Ultima VI es único en el sentido de que es un mundo completamente continuo. No existe un "mapamundi" en el juego, todas las localizaciones están conectadas entre sí convirtiendo el mundo del juego en un entorno abierto. En comparación con anteriores entregas de la serie, el juego se centra más en las misiones y la exploración que en el combate.

meta.name: The Ultimate Pinball Quest
meta.desc: The Ultimate Pinball Quest boasts of "the largest pinball table ever created", and can back it up with the 99-level table "Wasteland", along with two others of smaller size. While the level of quality may be higher in more traditional pinball games, the sheer size of the tables is quite impressive. The game features three modes. Adventure, in which the three tables are connected; arcade, which is the traditional style allowing you to select any of the three tables; and bonus, allowing you to play the six bonus stages. While the Arcade and Bonus modes require no explanation, the adventure mode does. It starts you out in the Wasteland, but has hidden links to both of the other tables, similar to the links to the bonus tables, but much less common. Also of note is the storyline that attempts to provide a background to the game.

meta.name: The Ultimate Ride
meta.desc: The Ultimate Ride is a first-person motorcycle racing game featuring six Japanese bikes to choose from. The player participates in races (either with our without qualifying lap) and tries to win them. While not a simulation, the game's controls are more on the realistic side, requiring the player to drive carefully with the powerful machines given. The most important aspect of the game are the courses: there are six traditional courses modeled after real-life ones and six which lead over countrysides. On those the player also has to worry about obstacles like animals on the road or other vehicles (there is no oncoming traffic, though). The only customization options for the bikes are the choice between manual or automatic gears and three tires which should be chosen dependent on the course and weather conditions. There is also an editor to design new courses.

meta.name: Ultimate Xtreme Racing
meta.desc: The CD release of XTreme Racing with additional data including tracks over the original 3 disk version. XTreme Racing is a racing game that utilizes real 3D environments, as opposed to the sprite-based Lotus and the unshaded polygons of World Circuit. The game features a wide environment with full freedom of movement and some Mode 7-style effects. Various pre-made characters can be chosen to represent the player. A course designer and a sound editor are included as well. The difficulty level is customizable, and the cars don't "cheat" in terms of artificially keeping up with the player-controlled vehicle or pushing it out of the way and continuing at unabated speed. There many weapons on track to be picked up and fired at will, to deal with the opponents in a more unorthodox way. Multiplayer options allow up to eight human players to compete, achieved linking two systems, similarly to Super Skidmarks.

meta.name: UMS II : Nations at War
meta.desc: Sequel to the original Universal Military Simulator of 1988, this release continues the game concept of its predecessor and allows the player total control of nearly every aspect of a battle. In the original program, three scenarios are included: Invasion of the Allies in Normandy 1944, Battles of Alexander the Great in 334 B.C. and Napoleon´s greatest battles at Trafalgar, Austerlitz, Borodino and Waterloo. Also included is the UMS Planet Edition which lets the player create their own scenarios.

meta.name: Under Pressure
meta.desc:
The pressure is building up, and you don't have a minute to lose!
Quick! The bad guys have captured your gorgeous galactic gal — and to make matters worse you've been imprisoned in a robot shell. It's you against the bad guys in this visually stunning game of skill where the action takes place on increasingly difficult levels.
To reach her you must:
- Fight your way through many levels of weird and wonderful alien landscapes.
- Mess with some of the biggest, meanest monsters you've ever met.
- Risk your life as you encounter teleports, gravity lifts and flaming volcanoes on the way.
You really will be under pressure!

meta.name: UMS : The Universal Military Simulator
meta.desc:
UMS (Universal Military Simulator) attempts to cover the ground of games like Empire and go beyond, simulating almost every aspect of warfare in a realistic manner. Battles can range from ancient history to a science-fiction future, with famed battled such as Gettysburg and the Battle of Hastings built in. The view system operates at multiple levels, from a single unit up to the whole theater.
However, there is no naval element whatsoever and the design pays little attention to extremely important wargaming concepts like fog of war.
The game spawned a sequel, UMS II.

meta.name: Universe 3
meta.desc:
Unlike the first two games in the series, which fell into the roleplaying and resource-management category, Universe 3 poses true logic-based puzzles for you to solve. Your characters move about in much the same way as their counterparts in Breach, Omnitrend's tactical combat RPG.
You set out to escort a diplomat on a trip to the hyperspace booster (a key element of Universe 2) to investigate the disappearance of shipments from Earth to this remote corner of the star map. The story takes a quick twist when you and your crew are captured, forcing you to rack up some criminal charges during your escape. You'll spend the rest of your time looking for evidence about the missing shipments, which will clear you of the charges as well as wrap up the mystery.

meta.name: Universe
meta.desc:
You are Boris Verne, a normal guy who is been cast in a parallel universe because of your uncle's Virtual Dimension Inducer. There you'll have to find the fabled lost star as well as a way to defeat the Golden King...
This is a classic old-style adventure game with a point&click interface. It uses the Rotoscope system to manage game characters and scores really beautiful 256-colour graphic.

meta.name: Unreal
meta.desc:
Unreal is an action/adventure that is completely unrelated to the popular FPS from 1998 with the same name. Unreal is a magical world where you must save Princess Isolde, your true love, from the evil Polymorphic, the Master of Darkness.
Unreal is made up of 8 levels and contains a mixture of 2D and 3D graphics.  The environment is also completely interactive - you can run up and down hills and slide through the snow but you have to be careful to not fall of the top of a cliff.
On each level you will be faced with puzzles and battles and you need to get the high score you pass to the next level.  If your health reaches zero you will die and the game is over.  Fortunately, your health is replenished at the end of each level.

meta.name: U.N. Squadron
meta.desc:
En U.N. Squadron, el objetivo es eliminar al enemigo, que se ha reunido en torno al espacio aéreo aliado del "Área 88", en una serie de escenarios basados en aviones militares.
El jugador elige a uno de los tres pilotos, cada uno con diferentes habilidades en reparación de daños, manejo de armas y pilotaje, y se enfrenta al enemigo en una serie de desafiantes misiones. El jugador comienza con el avión más débil, el F8E Crusader, que sólo puede armarse con una gama muy básica de armas. Pero al completar varias misiones, es posible amasar suficiente dinero para comprar mejores aviones que pueden equiparse con armas más potentes.

meta.name: The Untouchables
meta.desc: Eres ¨The Untouchables¨ en este juego de acción de desplazamiento lateral. Juega como Elliot Ness, quien se encuentra tras el despiadado jefe de la mafia Al Capone. Tienea varias tareas a lo largo de los 6 niveles y una gran variedad de armas para recoger, como una escopeta o o una pistola de aire comprimido. Pero ten cuidado con los secuaces de Capone.

meta.name: Up Scope
meta.desc: In Up Scope the player simulates the controls of a submarine console to orient the periscope and target enemy ships with torpedoes. In each stage the goal is to destroy the submarine hunter in a limited amount of time. Other ships can be destroyed for bonus points. The intercom will alert the player where the hunter is. If the submarine hunter manages to get close, it will begin to launch depth charges at the submarine and the player will be required to dodge them and avoid sea mines before going for the next attack. The game ends when the time is up or the submarine has been destroyed.

meta.name: Uridium 2
meta.desc:
Te envían para eliminar media docena de grupos de batalla enemiga, cada uno de los cuales consta de cuatro enormes naves espaciales. Deberás enfrentarte a un número cada vez mayor de alas de combate hostiles y defensas estacionarias mientras barres los portaaviones. Luego de eliminar la mayor parte de la presencia enemiga, te encargas del núcleo del reactor, mientras flotas en un entorno sin gravedad, baje los escudos del núcleo y hazlo añicos.
También hay una serie de armas adicionales que se pueden recolectar volando sobre lo que queda de las alas enemigas o atrapándolas después de que el generador de energía haya sido destruido.

meta.name: USS John Young
meta.desc: 1995 A.D. The Persian Gulf situation heightens in fear and intensity. Frequently, and now continously, confrontations arise between Iranian, Iraqui and American military units. As captain of the American destroyer, U.S.S. John Young, the highest fleet commands order you to assist. Your instructions involve extensive convoy protection. Also, submarine hunting and the bombardment of oil rigs, enemy planes, tanks and battleships is critical to success. In your control is the most advanced weaponry. But beware! The enemy is also prepared.

meta.name: Utopia : The Creation of a Nation
meta.desc:
Utopia toma el concepto de juego de Sim City y le agrega un elemento militar. El juego está ambientado en un futuro lejano, donde tu trabajo es nada menos que Colony Administrator para un nuevo asentamiento en algún planeta lejano. Su objetivo es proporcionar la calificación de calidad de vida más alta para los colonos.
Lo hace asegurándose de que haya suficiente soporte vital, energía, vivienda, empleo, policía y entretenimiento para mantener felices a los ciudadanos de su colonia. Obstaculizar su objetivo son los eventos aleatorios como los eclipses solares (que pueden hacer que sus paneles solares estén inactivos) y también una raza alienígena hostil y diferente que habita los planetas en los muchos escenarios que se ofrecen.

meta.name: Vampire's Empire
meta.desc:
You are Dr. van Helsing! Equipped with garlic, mirrors and a crystal ball you will try to direct a ray of light through the sinister dungeons, where the ancient horror dwells: Count Dracula himself! 
- more than 160 screens. 
- elaborate strategic aim with guiding the ray of light. 
- rapid action game. 
- four different game-phases. 
- tense atmosphere with lots of surprises.

meta.name: Vaxine
meta.desc: In this first person driver/shooter, the player must protect a body's base cells from attack by evil infecting cells.  The field of battle is a toroidal grid on which your tri-colored half-sphere base cells sit awaiting your protection.  The invading cells (also tri-colored spheres) attempt to bond together into groups and destroy your bases.  You destroy the infecting cells by lobbing antibodies (also tri-colored spheres) at them.  Hit an infector with the right color shot and it is destroyed.  The catch is that you have a limited amount of each color of ammunition.  Run out of a color and the game is over.  The situation is also complicated by Spitters, enemies that appear and spew out new attacking cells if you take too long to complete a level.

meta.name: Vector Ball
meta.desc:
This one on one future sport combines ideas from a number of real-world competitions, most notably the schoolgirl favourite Netball (I wonder why the ad blurb makes no mention of this?). The action is viewed isometrically, so moving the joystick up moves your droid north-east, down moves south-west, and so on.
The aim is to score more points than your opponent in each match, and be the first to win four matches (against either a human or computer opponent), before moving up to the next difficulty level. There is a goal in the middle at each end, and the ball can be advanced by shooting it (the length of a shot is affected by pushing the joystick up or down with fire pressed) as you can't run with the ball, or hold onto it for long. The main novel idea in the game is the shaping of the pitches, which are viewed in full 3D and have bumps and big divots all around.

meta.name: Vegas Gambler
meta.desc:
Feel the excitement! Experience the thrill! Now you can have all the fun and glamour of a Las Vegas casino in your own home. 
California Dreams' Vegas Gambler is an accurate simulation of four of your favorite games. The payoffs are big and the action is fast. Using the same odds as a famous Las Vegas casino the game gives you that “Vegas” feeling. Vegas Gambler adds the flashing lights and lively music to put you in the gambling mood.
SLOT MACHINE lets you pull the handle and watch for a jackpot. Listen as the coins fall. See the lights flash.
BLACKJACK puts you at the table. Beat the dealer! Develop your own winning strategy.
POKER combines the excitement of the card game with the speed of a video game to give a fascinating new twist to one of your favorite gambling games.
ROULETTE gives you the feeling of playing at a Las Vegas casino. Place your favorite bets and spin the wheel.

meta.name: Vengeance of Excalibur
meta.desc: This follow-on to Arthurian RPG adventure Spirit of Excalibur, Vengeance of Excalibur picks up where the old one ended. While power in Britain has been restored after the death of King Arthur and the destruction of evil sorceress Morgan Le Fay a terrible force has been unleashed. The demonic Shadowmaster, a dark summoning of the slain witch, is terrorizing Britain entrapping the King and stealing the fair court enchantress, Nineve. You must command the knights of the kingdom to find and destroy the vile beast.

meta.name: Venom Wing
meta.desc: Venom Wing es una extraña mezcla de estilos: pilotas una nave espacial clon de R-Type estándar. A veces se convierte en un águila. Los enemigos incluyen demonios, robots, formas de vida orgánicas, objetos que rebotan indescriptibles y un dragón gigantesco en el espacio. El jefe final es ED-209 de la película Robocop.

meta.name: Venus : The Flytrap
meta.desc:
Después de que la humanidad destruya la Tierra por la superpoblación y la contaminación excesiva, se hace imprescindible enviar una mosca robótica para limpiarla. Toma el control de la mosca y elimina a las criaturas y plantas mutantes. Debes atravesar 8 mundos, incluyendo las Tierras Heladas, las Cavernas y el Valle de la Muerte.
La mayoría de las criaturas sensibles sueltan una bola al matarlas, dispárale para liberar una de las muchas opciones como armas mejoradas, movimiento más rápido, vida extra o características negativas como perder una vida o invertir los controles. A medida que avanza el juego, los niveles se vuelven cada vez más complejos y basados en plataformas.

meta.name: Viaje Al Centro De La Tierra
meta.desc: La gran aventura de Julio Verne en uno de los proyectos más ambiciosos del software español. Topo ha realizado un videojuego en el que todo el misterio del mundo subterráneo, narrado por Verne, está perfectamente reflejado. El interior del volcán, la jungla prehistórica, los ríos de lava y todos los extraños monstruos que habitan en las profundidades te harán vivir la más emocionante de las aventuras.

meta.name: Victory Road
meta.desc:
La historia se retoma directamente al final de Ikari Warriors. Felicitados por el general Kawasaki por haberle salvado, Paul y Vince (también llamados Ralf y Clark) regresan a su patria en un avión fletado por el general. Aparece una misteriosa tormenta y son arrojados miles de años al futuro (¡o a otra dimensión!). Son recibidos por una criatura alienígena que les dice que el malvado Zang Zip (Zangelt) se ha apoderado de este mundo.
Para ayudarles a volver a casa, utiliza sus viejas armas de fuego y otras nuevas para derrotar a más y más enemigos, como hombres verdes cíclopes, bestias con cabeza de piedra y el malvado Zangelt.

meta.name: Vigilante
meta.desc: Vigilante es un beat-em-up de desplazamiento lateral. Presenta a un duro personaje que recorre las calles para luchar contra la banda de los Rogues, que han secuestrado a su novia María. El juego cuenta con cinco localizaciones distintas, como calles de la ciudad y un vertedero, con numerosos matones de diferentes características. Se lucha con los puños, los pies y la cadena, realizando ataques de pie, agachado y saltando. Cada nivel tiene un jefe final que requiere tácticas específicas. Los enemigos aparecen continuamente por los lados izquierdo y derecho de la pantalla hasta llegar al jefe. Esto significa que tienes que moverte a un ritmo rápido para llegar al final del nivel antes de que se agote el tiempo. Cuando los enemigos se acercan demasiado, agarran al personaje y es necesario pulsar rápidamente a izquierda y derecha para liberarlo, ya que entonces es vulnerable a los ataques.

meta.name: Vindicators
meta.desc:
El Imperio Tangente prepara su invasión a la Tierra con una flota de tanques, y tú eres el elegido para destruir las 14 estaciones espaciales que representan la amenaza.
Cada estación tiene tres subniveles —jugables en el orden que quieras— en los que controlas un dron con forma de tanque articulado, disparando a enemigos mientras la pantalla se desplaza libremente en todas direcciones. Guiarlo al principio es lento y torpe, lo que dificulta esquivar rivales. Pero hay recompensa: estrellas de energía repartidas por los niveles que, al finalizar, puedes canjear por mejoras: armas más potentes, mayor velocidad… y una sensación de progreso muy satisfactoria.

meta.name: Violator
meta.desc:
Un shoot 'em up vertical, por niveles y en la línea de SWIV: pilotas un avión sobre paisajes hostiles repletos de cazas enemigos y torretas. Los aviones suelen atacar en formación, lanzando balas naranjas bien visibles —fáciles de esquivar o abatir—, mientras las torretas rotan en 8 direcciones y te persiguen con precisión implacable: aquí, la agilidad salva vidas.
También aparecen vehículos más grandes que descienden en línea recta. Los helicópteros sueltan mejoras: armas extra (con munición limitada —¡así que disparar sin parar no siempre ayuda!), aumento de velocidad y recarga de energía. Si los daños superan el 100 %, pierdes una de tus 5 vidas. Los aviones gigantes bombardean sin cesar, pero valen 5000 puntos si los derribas. Y al final de cada nivel… llega el jefe: un coloso que zigzaguea lateralmente mientras baja —y si se escapa por abajo, ¡vuelve a entrar por arriba!

meta.name: Virocop
meta.desc: Excelente juego de Graftgold para Amiga. Es un juego tipo laberinto, parecido al Chaos Engine pero con un toque al Micro Machines. Puedes mejorar las armas y conseguir nuevas al finalizar cada fase tras recolectar artefactos que dejan algunos enemigos al morir. El juego es muy colorido y fluido, en ningún momento experimenta lag a pesar del gran número de proyectiles y enemigos simultaneos en pantalla. Existen dos versiones, una para Amiga 1000 y 500, con gráficos ECS y otra mejorada con gráficos AGA para Amiga 1200 o CD32. Es un 'Must to Play'. Imprescindible. Muy buena implementación de la física.

meta.name: Virtual Karting 2
meta.desc:
Strap on your seat-belt, no other karting simulation comes close.
Virtual Karting 2 - The Ultimate Karting Simulation has finally hit the Amiga. It's the fastest racing action yet and includes six gruelling tracks to race over.
Easily the fastest 3D texture-mapped graphics you'll see, even on a standard A1200, this game really moves.

meta.name: Virtual Karting
meta.desc:
Very much the most serious go-karting simulation even seen, Virtual Karting gives a texture-mapped world running at at least 25fps. There are 3 different circuits on offer, to be raced in any order, each with a full field of computer opponents to face. The AI has a very rigid feel, and it's one of those racing games where they're better thought of as a succession of obstacles, sticking to the same racing line, and carrying on unscathed from contact even if you spin.
There are several different viewpoints on offer, both 2D overhead and 3D. Especially on the Advanced course, some corners are very tight, and the run-off areas quite sluggish to rejoin from.

meta.name: Virus
meta.desc:
Aliens have infested Earth, and are spreading a deadly virus throughout the planet. Needless to say, they must be stopped, and fast. The time pressure (your score upon completing a level is based on the uninfected percentage of the land) is only one difficult aspect of this shooter.
Viewed in remote 3D with a patchwork-quilt type ground effect, with trees sticking out and full gravity. Controlling your spaceship involves balancing the direction and height as well as thrusting to the right speed. A scanner tells you where the aliens are.

meta.name: Vital Light
meta.desc:
Vital Light es una mezcla entre Space Invaders, Tetris y ese curioso puzzle de Konami llamado Quarth en el que con una nave que disparaba cuadros, había que ir rellenando superficies hasta igualarlas para hacerlas desaparecer. En este caso es casi lo mismo, solo que en vez de caer piezas al estilo Tetris, tenemos que cambiar el color de nuestros cuadros hasta que las piezas que caen sean todas de un color, algo similar a la mecánica de Klax. Una vez elijamos el color de pieza necesario en la rueda con una cara en medio, procedemos a disparar el color, lo que hará que la gema correspondiente cambie de nombre.
Además de estos cuadros-gemas, en el escenario aparecerán unas caras con alas, que nos otorgarán distintas ventajas en el juego si las agarramos al vuelo.
Nuestro lanzador, se desplaza por un riel, que puede ser obstruido por el ordenador, con una especie de cepos de cristal, que podremos romper con repetidos impactos del lanzador.

meta.name: Viz : The Game
meta.desc: Viz: The Game is an action game where the players run through various scrolling environments. It is based on a British comic magazine VIZ which, like the game, features lots of crude humour and fart jokes. The player controls one of the 3 Viz characters - Johnny Fartpants, Buster Gonad, or Biffa Bacon. The race takes place in five different scrolling environments; country, town, building site, beach and a disco. During the race you have to dodge traps and other characters from the VIZ comics.

meta.name: Volfied
meta.desc:
Volfied es una conversión de una máquina recreativa desarrollada por Taito a finales de los años 80. El juego es muy similar a Qix, el jugador toma el control de un objeto cuyo propósito es recorrer la pantalla, crear formas y eliminarlas del campo de juego. A modo de recompensa, una imagen se revela gradualmente en las áreas eliminadas de la pantalla. Los bordes del área que no ha despejado se convierten en el borde del área por la que puede moverse.
Debe evitar el contacto con cualquiera de los enemigos que flotan alrededor de la pantalla, ya que esto lo debilitará y eventualmente lo destruirá. El objetivo es borrar el 80 % o más de la pantalla y cada porcentaje adicional suma puntos de bonificación.

meta.name: Voyager
meta.desc:
The Voyager II space probe found us some impressive images of outer space. However, it was later found by the people of Roxiz, who locate Earth and decide to invade it, by establishing bases on each of Saturn's 10 moons. As former POW Luke Snayles, you must destroy each of these fleets of 80 aliens, before they can be dispatched.
Voyager is viewed from on board the craft, and is a first person shoot 'em up using polygon graphics. You start with a laser and a few bombs, but can collect extra weaponry and the ability to fly through the mothership. Not all enemies can be killed simply by shooting them, so there is a tactical element to the slaughter.

meta.name: Voyages of Discovery
meta.desc:
Exploration is a strategy-simulation game set during the Age of Sail.  From the time of Vasco da Gama and Columbus (the late 1400s) to the French Revolution (1789), you are put in charge of a nation's imperial destiny.  This means financing voyages, assembling crews, sending out land and sea expeditions, founding colonies, and occasionally engaging other European powers for global dominance.
Exploration may seem familiar to players of Civilization, Colonization, Conquest of the New World, Gold of the Americas, and even Sid Meier's Pirates!, as they borrow from exploration and cover a similar topic.

meta.name: Vroom
meta.desc: Vroom es un juego de carreras de autos de Fórmula 1 que se puede jugar en modo arcade o simulación. La pantalla principal de opciones te permite seleccionar transmisión manual o automática, número de vueltas y entrenamiento, carrera única o temporada completa. La opción multijugador permite que dos jugadores compitan entre sí en computadoras separadas. Cada pista, con diferentes diseños y gráficos de fondo, incluye muchas curvas cerradas, pendientes pronunciadas e inclinaciones, así como túneles y parada en boxes. El juego presenta una combinación colorida de gráficos en 3D y 2D, efectos de sonido realistas y animaciones suaves y ultrarrápidas.

meta.name: Vroom Multi-Player
meta.desc: There are two modes of play available: "Arcade", "Grand Prix". In both of these modes you complete a certain number of laps (4, 8, or 12) and select which circuit that you want to race on. The circuits include San Marino, France, Britain, Germany, Italy, Portugal, Japan, and Australia. Some circuits are easy, while some are difficult. There are slight differences between the two modes. For instance, "Arcade" allows you to select the circuit in any order that you like, whereas "Grand Prix" only allows you to fine-tune your car before starting a race. You also need to race a circuit in the order that they appear on the circuit selection screen, but you can skip a track if you want. Vroom multi-player is a 1-2 player game, meaning that if you have another player handy, you can compete against each other.

meta.name: Vyper
meta.desc: Vyper is a single screen shoot 'em up similar to Galaga where the player has to save the universe by shooting down large quantities of aliens known as the Yarks. The game can be played by one or two players (in hot seat) and there are 100 different levels and 25 different kinds of aliens. The player controls his space ship down the bottom of the screen and shoot at the aliens above him. Like in Galaga the aliens enters the screen in specific formations before taking their stationary places. After that they then leave the formation, a few at a time, and try to crash into the player. Each alien type has its own movement pattern. The player starts with three ships and after they have been all destroyed it's game over. An extra ship is awarded after every third completed level.

meta.name: Vyrus
meta.desc: "Vyrus" is a multi-scrolling shooter for the Commodore Amiga. As a classic shooter that relies on quick reactions and precise shooting, "Vyrus" offers an exciting and action-packed gaming experience that benefits from the dynamic, free-scrolling game world. In "Vyrus" the player takes control of a spaceship that must navigate through various levels while being surrounded by enemy creatures and projectiles. The gameplay follows the familiar pattern of many arcade shooters: the player moves in all directions while the screen scrolls in real time and must continuously shoot enemies and avoid obstacles. The goal is to overcome the enemy waves and survive until the end of the level.

meta.name: Wacky Darts
meta.desc: The bar room game of darts involves aiming small projectiles at a circular board. The board is divided into 20 shapes around the edge, each of which has a value from 1 to 20 points, a special double area around the edge and a special treble area in the middle (each of which multiply the shot score). There is also a bullseye right in the middle for 50 points and an outer bull around it, worth 25 points. Players always take three shots at a time. In the 501 game the aim is to reduce the score from 501 to 0, finishing with a double or the bull. If the score reaches 1 or a negative number, any shots in that set of 3 are cancelled out. In Round The Board, the player must hit each target in turn starting with 20, but moving back 2 or 3 for a double or treble, eventually finishing with Double Top. Both of these games are recreated in this simulation. The movement of the cursor you use to aim is slightly skiddy, to recreate natural jitters (or, as some would cynically suggest, the effects of being as drunk as most darts players). Wacky Darts lives up to its name by featuring an assortment of human, alien, and machine opponents of varying difficulties. Each of them has a short profile, and use a different object to hit the board.

meta.name: Wacky Races
meta.desc: You take on the role of Dastardly and Mutley from the Hanna-Barbera cartoon series in this action title with superficial racing overtones. Your aim is to complete each course in a particular position, which is achieved either by waiting for them to suffer enough damage to drop out of the race, or by inflicting that damage yourself. Your car is armed with a forward-shooting arrow to impale the opposition cars, and deal with the many hazards the races throw at you, including boulders and rabbits, which can be taken out for points.

meta.name: Walker
meta.desc: Walker es un shooter clásico con desplazamiento lateral de derecha a izquierda. El jugador toma el control del gigantesco robot AG-9 (nombre en clave Walker). La misión es simple: guía a Walker a través de las cuatro zonas y mata a todos/destruye todo. Cada zona también se divide en dos partes. El camino está lleno de enemigos entrenados con un solo propósito: Destruir a Walker. Sin embargo, salvo inmunidad relativa, el robot está equipado con dos cañones de carabinas de 30 mm. La cantidad de enemigos es realmente enorme, atacan en grupos, desde el suelo y desde el aire. Además, cada zona consiste en tipos especiales de enemigos que obligan al jugador a mantenerse alerta. Como de costumbre, hay un poderoso jefe al final del nivel (afortunadamente, cada jefe tiene su propio punto débil).

meta.name: Wall Defence
meta.desc: Well Defence is a 1-player arcade game. The player is perched atop the ramparts of a medieval castle as enemy invaders attempt to scale the walls. The player can move horizontally, and boulders can be obtained from the far edges of the screen. The player's goal is to toss boulders down upon the enemy hordes, thus knocking them to the bottom of the castle. The player advances to a more difficult level every 200 points, and the speed which enemies ascend increases. When an enemy makes it to the top of the wall, the player is tossed to the ground, and the game is over. Goal is to maximize score.

meta.name: Wanderer 3D
meta.desc: Wanderer is set in the future where cats have become very valuable. The hero's cat has been kidnapped by someone who demands 8000 cats as ransom. Additionally, all the planets of the universe are obsessed with an poker-like card game. So the player visits planets, barters cards and plays the card game - and if a planet is satisfied with their own set, they reward the player with cats.

meta.name: Wanted
meta.desc: Wanted is a vertically scrolling shooter with a Western theme, similar to Gunsmoke. The player takes the role of a bounty hunter who has to bring four desperadoes to justice. They can be tackled in any order and if all are defeated, a fifth level emerges. The gameplay offers no surprises: shooting masses of enemies until reaching the end of the level. The player can shoot barrels to receive extras, e.g. boots for extra speed or a rifle for a better range. Dynamite destroys every enemy on the screen.

meta.name: Warhead
meta.desc:
Strategy and action are combined in this 3D space game. The setting involves a mysterious race of beings attacking humanity for an unknown reason, and the FOE-57 Spacecraft being humanity’s only hope.
Once you’re into space, the craft is directed using the mouse. The keyboard controls offer autopilot modes, multiple weapons including Mines and Stinger missiles, an HUD display, multiple viewpoints, targeting and navigation, all of which must be used as appropriate. The menus feature some cinematic-feeling link screens, and some moody music.

meta.name: J.R.R. Tolkien's War in Middle Earth
meta.desc: J.R.R. Tolkien's War in Middle Earth is the 16-bit game with additional adventuring features compared to the 8-bit version, loosely depicting the events of the One Ring from the Shire to Mt. Doom. The game starts with the three hobbits: Frodo, Sam, and Pippin surrounded by nine individual units of Nazgul near the Shire. Although the first task is to travel to Rivendell, the player is free to decide how heroes and armies progress, despite the in-game conventional storyline. Victory is attained by successfully sending the ring bearer to Mt. Doom - how this accomplished is completely up to the player. Additionally, any hero including Frodo may die during combat. If the ring bearer dies during combat, a new ring bearer (if they survive the encounter) will be appointed to carry the One Ring. If the enemy gains possession of the One Ring is taken by the enemy, they will attempt to reach Barad-Dur, Sauron's fortress in the heart of Mordor, which will result in the player's defeat. The player will also lose if the enemy manages to seize three major allied citadels.

meta.name: War in the Gulf
meta.desc: A third game in the tank combat series, following from Team Yankee (whose story and setting came from a book) and Pacific Islands (set in an imaginary 1995 war). The third game imagines a situation in which Iraq invades Kuwait for a second time. The series' main distinguishing feature was the way you always viewed all 4 tanks in a platoon at the same time, via a split screen. Action here is purely mouse-driven. The AI has been significantly updated from previous games in the series. A full roster of tanks and weapons are included, with Iraq mainly using Soviet machinery. A major consideration involves destroying particular buildings for money, and preventing other particular ones being destroyed, also for financial reasons.

meta.name: Warlock's Quest
meta.desc: Warlock is a game which played much like Ghosts & Goblins. The player has to find the ancient relics which are needed in order to beat "The Unspeakable One". When the player kills enemy characters in the game they will sometimes drop powerups including vitality (health), power (magic), armor, treasure (points), and mystery (often bad things).

meta.name: Warlock the Avenger
meta.desc: In the beginning there was 'Druid', hailed as a milestone game at the time of its release. Then came 'Enlightenment', and now there's Warlock the avenger, the third game in a classic series. Designed by Dene Carter, Warlock the avenger takes the player yet deeper into the dangerous world of Belorn, where the evil lord Acamantor has returned to hold the land in his grasp. Strive to reawaken your ancient spells and find your way through eight trap-strewn dungeons, overcoming unknown obstacles, locating secret passage ways and keeping Acamantor's monstrous minions at bay. Your task is to find and destroy the evil power. Only by unleashing the arcane power of Chaos can final victory be yours.

meta.name: Warlords
meta.desc:
The first in the Warlords series. Basically, your mission is world domination. This may be played between up to 8 people all on the same machine. It is a medieval type strategy game that requires the player to control 80 cities in the realm of Illuria. In order to do so you must wipe out your 7 opponents. 
Gold is accrued through the ownership of cities. The gold is then used to create armies. Heroes can sometimes "find" things or be rewarded by sages (there are only 2 and it's a first come first served basis). You can choose between various human and non-human peoples, as well as the ubiquitous evil Warlord. This is a very early version of what strategy games eventually became.

meta.name: War Machine
meta.desc:
Solo tú puedes salvar al mundo de la destrucción, encontrando cuatro partes del arma para usar contra el malvado líder del Alien Syndicate. Esta tarea debe completarse en 80 minutos, aunque tiene cinco vidas disponibles.
El juego consiste principalmente en impulsar a tu personaje con el mono y poderosamente armado a través de los niveles, destruyendo las fuerzas alienígenas a medida que avanza. Los niveles tienen muchas piezas de repisas y picos por todas partes, que deben planificarse alrededor, así como pozos de lava. Hay armamento adicional y municiones para recoger en el camino. Tu arma principal se puede disparar en cualquier dirección, pero no puedes moverte y disparar al mismo tiempo a menos que estés disparando hacia la izquierda o hacia la derecha.

meta.name: Warm-Up
meta.desc: A top-down racing game inspired by Formula 1. Players choose from eight cars with customizable options such as gearing (automatic or manual), acceleration, speed, tires, spoilers, dampers, and steering sensitivity. These settings affect car control and can be adjusted during pit stops. The game offers three difficulty levels and several modes: training, single races, and a full season across 16 real-world-inspired tracks arranged in a linear order.

meta.name: Warp
meta.desc: Destroy the energy stations in this action filled shoot-em-up. At the end of each completed level you must guide your craft throughthe warp tunnel, a 3D flight sequence, to reach the next, higher level. You will need strength planning and strategy in order to find the maps, energy dumps as well as a host of other features.

meta.name: Warzone
meta.desc:
Welcome to Warzone, a smooth scrolling, all action arcade type game that uses the full colour graphic capabilities of your machine to the full. The downward scrolling takes you tank through many different cities and landscapes.
How far can you progress through without being blown apart? Will you be able to reach your final objective?

meta.name: War Zone
meta.desc: El juego consta de 8 misiones de desplazamiento cenital en las que controlas a un soldado tipo Arnold armado con una ametralladora básica. Cada misión transcurre en un lugar diferente, el punto de partida es la jungla, pero también visitará algún tipo de tiendas, alcantarillas y fábricas. Tu tarea es llegar al final de la misión y destruir al jefe principal. A lo largo de tu camino te esperan muchos enemigos. Aguarde una fuerte resistencia por parte de la infantería armada con ametralladoras, misiles guiados y granadas. Por supuesto, estos usan muchos vehículos, así que prepárate para trenes, tanques, helicópteros, jeeps e incluso un submarino. Afortunadamente, no dependes solo de la ametralladora. Dispara cajas con el signo "W" y ármate con armas más fuertes como lanzagranadas, lanzallamas, lanzamisiles guiados o láser. También esté atento a los rehenes. Si libera uno, obtendrá puntos o un paquete de salud.

meta.name: Watchtower
meta.desc: Watchtower is a topdown arcade action game in the same style as Commando or Ikari Warriors. You take the role of a hitman, a professional mercenary who takes jobs from various factions across the globe. The game has six missions in three different terrain types: jungle, desert and city. In your inventory you have seven weapons to choose from. Some of them are a Kalashnikov, a minigun and a flame thrower. The enemies that will come in your way range from ordinary soldiers to armed vehicles and aircraft. The game can be played either   in single player mode or the simultaneous two player mode.

meta.name: Waterloo
meta.desc:
Waterloo, arguably the most famous battle in history, was fought on June 18, 1815 between the French Forces of the Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte and the English and combined Allied forces under the Duke of Wellington and Prussian forces under Field Marshall Blucher.
Waterloo the game was a revolutionary new concept in wargaming when it was published in 1989. Waterloo dispensed with the normal overview given to wargame commanders and instead gave a player the same point of view as real commanders on the field of battle.

meta.name: WaxWorks
meta.desc:
As a child, you were never taught of your family's dark secret - a whole history of 'evil twins' doing Satan's work on earth, and 'good twins' attempting to put this right. Your uncle informs you of this shortly before his death, and after travelling to his castle you find that you must travel through time to correct these wrongdoings.
Through a range of murals at your uncle's house, various past scenes must be entered, with more becoming available as you complete them. In each you must find and kill your demented relative in time. The game's controls are point and click, with the interface allowing you to examine and collect objects, select a weapon, and attack potential foes by striking at a particular part of their body.

meta.name: Wayne Gretzky Hockey 2
meta.desc: Wayne Gretzky Hockey 2 is a top-down hockey game. There are many options to change the match settings, e.g. the difficulty level, speed or the referee's behaviour. The editor offers the possibility to create new tactics or lineups as well as changing the abilities and names of the athletes. In contrast to most other sports games, the athletes are controlled indirectly: the player uses the input device to show the athlete where he should move. The active athlete can be changed.

meta.name: Wayne Gretzky Hockey
meta.desc: The first of three Wayne Gretzky games from Bethesda. It contains everything that could be found in a hockey rink, from big hits and fighting to icings and offsides. It's not only about what is on the ice but also outside, offering the player plenty of coaching options and gives you the ability to create your own players and teams

meta.name: The Way of the Little Dragon
meta.desc: The Way of the Little Dragon or Little Dragon is a 2D versus fighting game centered around a Bruce Lee inspired character (hence the title "Little Dragon") who must beat a few fierce opponents just by using his kung-fu or Chinese boxing talents. A two player option is available although the Little Dragon opponents follow the one player progression path (less endurance points and cannot be picked up from a roster). The game was released in 1987 by reLINE Software and features digitized sounds inspired by the legendary Bruce Lee martial arts films and hand drawn graphics which were used as the static background of each stage, also the haunting score is not to be missed. This simple and straightforward fighting game is a joy to play for fans of the genre, even if it will probably not revolutionize the genre.

meta.name: Web of Terror
meta.desc: A spaceship has crashed on the planet Arachnia, home to a giant web that traps space debris and giant spiders. The spaceship's passengers have been forced to evacuate onto the web, where hungry spiders await them. As Rock Bimhead, your mission is to rescue as many passengers as possible before they are eaten by the spiders. Your ship is equipped with radar to locate the passengers, is fast enough to avoid spiders, and carries two types of missiles, Silver and Gold, to destroy the spiders. Watch the fuel, as you'll need to fly over fuel pods to refuel!

meta.name: Welltris
meta.desc:
Welltris, which is the first Tetris sequel, is originally designed by Alexey Pajitnov (the creator of Tetris) with Andrei Sgenov.
It has the same gameplay concept as Tetris; simply all the player has to do is to rotate and maneuver the falling pieces into a proper position in order to form complete layers in the rectangular playground. But Welltris changes this rectangular arena into a four sided well with grid-like walls and bottom where the falling pieces can be moved from wall to wall within the well. Form the pieces into solid rows either horizontally or vertically on the bottom of the well.
Billed itself as Tetris in three dimensions.

meta.name: Wembley Rugby League
meta.desc: Having previously recreated the more popular Rugby Union with World Class Rugby, Audiogenic turned their attention to Rugby League, using the same game engine. The main difference in Rugby League is that a team must give the ball away after six tackles. This often leads to risky maneuvers on the 5th tackle, especially when recovering the ball from the opposition, allowing a new set of six tackles. After a tackle, the ball is played back by what is known as "play-the-ball." Unlike Union, there are no line-outs, but scrums at touchdowns or when the ball is lost.

meta.name: Where in Europe is Carmen Sandiego?
meta.desc: Where in Europe Is Carmen Sandiego? is a 1988 European geography-based educational video game in the detective mystery franchise Carmen Sandiego. It was originally published by Broderbund in 1988 for Apple I , Commodore 64 and MS-DOS , and ported to the Apple IIGS , Amiga and Macintosh in 1989. It is the third Carmen Sandiego title, after world-based Where in the World Is Carmen Sandiego? (1985) and US-based Where in the USA Is Carmen Sandiego? (1986). Under the guidance of The Acme Agency's chief, the player completes cases to catch Carmen's henchmen; they accomplish this by traveling to European locations to investigate clues relating to the crook's last known whereabouts, and by gaining enough character data to issue a warrant of arrest. Once the player has captured all 15 thieves, they are able to chase after Carmen herself.

meta.name: Where in the U.S.A. Is Carmen Sandiego?
meta.desc: As a detective, the player must hunt down Carmen Sandiego's henchmen, who have stolen outrageous items that are important in US history and heritage.  Using clues, the player will follow the henchmen from city to city.

meta.name: Where in the World is Carmen Sandiego?
meta.desc: En el juego, tomas el papel de un investigador privado y tu tarea es atrapar criminales pertenecientes a la banda más poderosa del crimen organizado bajo el mando de Carmen Sandiego, una mujer con un cerebro criminal prodigioso. Durante tu investigación, deberás recorrer el mundo, viajando a diferentes ciudades e investigando diversas localizaciones. Conseguirás diferentes clases de pistas, en las que deberás basarte para realizar una orden de arresto y perseguir al criminal al cual le estás siguiendo la pista.

meta.name: Where Time Stood Still
meta.desc: Where Time Stood Still is an isometric 3D arcade adventure game released by Ocean in 1988 for the Sinclair Spectrum 128K, MS-DOS and Atari ST. The game has since been released on the Amiga in July 2014, and on Amiga CD32 in December 2014 and was converted from the Atari ST version with some enhancements which were not present in other iterations. The game was produced by Denton Designs as a follow-up to their successful 1986 title The Great Escape.

meta.name: Whirligig
meta.desc: WHIRLIGIG - The first-ever game to use LIGHTSOURCE 3D - Maelstrom's revolutionary system of shaded ultra-solid 3D graphics! An epic all-action game featuring lightning-fast speeds of play, graphic techniques BEYOND the arcade, 4 billion sectors to explore, 100 billion enemy ships to blast, and an awesome final objective to reach!

meta.name: White Death
meta.desc:
THE Russian Front, winter 1942.
As the German Sixth Army slowly starves in the devastated city of Stalingrad, the Soviets have launched a second onslaught against the Wehrmacht.
In a communique which Moscow radio broadcast last night the Russians announced their objective: Encircle and destroy the German garrison entrenched at the vital rail junction of Velikiye Luki. Lieutenant General Perkayev's Third Shock Army, reinforced with three separate corps have been assigned the mission.

meta.name: Wild Cup Soccer
meta.desc:
Después de Brutal Sports Football, surgió esta secuela ​​lanzada para la Copa del Mundo de 1994. En el modo de un jugador puedes jugar una Wild Cup o un sistema de Liga; El juego para dos jugadores está restringido a partidos individuales amistosos.
A diferencia de su predecesor, el juego utiliza un punto de vista isométrico, establecido por el popular FIFA y ,uy de moda en ese momento. Aquí vale todo para conseguir marcar incluidas patadas y puñetazos. Si un juego termina empatado, pasa a una la tanda de penaltis, que consiste en ir disparando al oponente; el último equipo en pie gana. Las pantallas previas al partido incluyen estilos de juego defensivos, transferencias y la posibilidad de comprar artículos como lanzacohetes y escudos.

meta.name: Wild West World
meta.desc: Wild West World is a strategy game in which you build up an economic empire in the old west of the 1800's. Farming, ranching, mining, and hunting, are all methods for generating cash to buy land and build your economic empire. Employees of various trades must be hired, farms, ranches, and mines established, and all must be kept supplied with livestock, food, and tools. Eventually, the only way to grow, will be to play dirty tricks on your competition, which include the hire of a gang of outlaws to harass or eliminate them, to bribe Indians to burn them out and kill their workers, and more.

meta.name: Wild Wheels
meta.desc: Wild Wheels is an action game in which two teams of five cars each try to bring a ball into other team's goal for points (more points are awarded for risky moves) and destroying all enemy cars. The player takes control over a single car which can be shown in various camera positions, most prominently directly behind the vehicle or top-down. There are also special fields on the field which grant advantages when passed. The single-player portion basically consists of a series of elimination matches with the goal to win all leagues of increasing difficulty levels. Between matches, the points earned with goals can be reinvested into new cars with better statistics - additionally they are also divided into five categories with different roles during the matches. The game features two control modes: in professional mode the player rotates the car when pushing left or right while arcade mode allows direct turns.

meta.name: Window Wizard
meta.desc:
The job of a happy-go-lucky window cleaner can often have its problems. The Window Wizard, W illy, knows what it can be like! Huge prehistoric birds! Acid rain clouds! Fanatic suicides!
Seven levels of fun and frolics with Willy in this Cartoon-Style caper offering great graphics, bonus levels, and some 100 different animated characters.

meta.name: Windsurf Willy
meta.desc: Windsurf Willy offers 1 or 2 player windsurfing action at 3 different skill levels. You're the contestant in 15 different locations, in which you must show 4 judges your skills, from speed to trick-surfing as you ride those waves. Points are awarded based how artistic the technique was. Judging the flow of the waves, and avoiding wreckage and other hazards, is crucial to maximising the score.

meta.name: Windwalker
meta.desc:
The sequel to Moebius, Windwalker combines role-playing with side-view beat 'em up gameplay. You are accompanied by Moebius on a quest to master the martial arts.
Hostile persons including thieves, guards and assassins will be encountered; you fight them in real time using moves such as cartwheels and flying kicks. This can be played either as a continuous battle, or with short breaks to catch your composure.
The role-playing elements eschew the Ultima-style plan view in favor of a pseudo-3D system. Deism and Shamanism are just some of the included magic disciplines. Magical vehicles help you get around the 100 landscapes more quickly, although you spend much time on foot. The game takes place in a fully active universe of characters such as villagers and giant beetles, all getting about their business within a day/night cycle and variable weather.

meta.name: Wings
meta.desc:
Eres un piloto de combate aliado en la Primera Guerra Mundial y te enfrentas a los alemanes en el cielo en más de 200 misiones.
Las misiones generalmente son tres tipos: misiones de bombardeo con vista cenital en las que tienes que eliminar objetivos estratégicamente importantes, carreras de ametralladoras isométricas en las que puedes destruir cualquier cosa que te apetezca con un suministro ilimitado de munición y, por supuesto, la parte principal. : Combates aereos en 3D.
El juego está ambientado en los años 1916 a 1918, y para ambientar mejor el juego, nuestro personaje irá escribiendo en un diario los acontecimientos que se irán sucedicendo a lo largo de la campaña. Es uno de los mejores juegos de Cinemaware de la época dorada en el Amiga.

meta.name: Wings of Death
meta.desc: Wings of Death es un shoot 'em up de desplazamiento vertical ambientado en un mundo de fantasía, en el que vuelas como un pequeño insecto dentro de un castillo lleno de criaturas hostiles. El extenso sistema de actualización se desvía de las convenciones del género: tu insecto se transforma en un murciélago o dragón más fuerte al actualizar. Al derribar enemigos, recolectas mejoras que mejoran tus armas nivel por nivel. Los enemigos también pueden liberar potenciadores negativos, marcados con una calavera, que debilitan tu arma o reducen tu nivel de energía. Después de luchar contra un dragón de tres cabezas, te mueves a diferentes entornos, como selvas y pantanos. El juego presenta una cantidad impresionante de objetos enemigos en la pantalla y, gracias a astutos trucos de hardware.

meta.name: Winnie the Pooh in the Hundred Acre Wood
meta.desc: Early this morning, a strong wind went through the hundred acre wood and picked up many objects and scattered them about. It is your job to locate all the objects, determine who the proper owners are, and return them. You had better hurry though, before the wind returns again! Along the way you'll meet all the familiar Winnie The Pooh characters including Eeyore, Owl, Tigger, and Piglet.

meta.name: Winter Camp
meta.desc:
Winter Camp is the sequel to Summer Camp. Maximus Mouse is now a rescue ranger at Camp Nice'n'Icy, but he soon notices a bird who will knock a pebble down a mountain, setting off a avalanche that will engulf the camp, unless he can prevent it, over eight varied levels.
The levels offer various challenges. The most common type of level is a patrol. There are three such levels, involving ice skating, boating on a river, and skiing. On each level you have a quota of rescues to make. There are various obstacles on the levels, and a variety of objects to use to avoid them. For example, a spring will allow you to jump over a stretch of water.
At the end of each of these levels is a boss, who must be defeated using the objects you have collected. The bosses are easier to defeat the more rescues you perform.
Other levels include a skate training level, a snowball fight with bears hiding in trees, and a memory game with a cameo appearance by Clyde Radcliffe from the Creatures series. Most of the levels have a time limit, indicated by the bird moving towards the pebble.

meta.name: Winter Olympiad 88
meta.desc:
This is a winter sports game that lets you compete in five Olympic events: Downhill skiing, Biathlon, Slalom, Ski Jump and Bob Sled. It is very similar to offerings like Winter Games from Epyx.
In Downhill skiing, you must avoid the obstacles and make it to the bottom of the hill, by swerving left and right and adjusting your speed by pushing the joystick forward and back. The Slalom is similar, involving skiing around flags.
In the ski jump, you must position the skis for a proper landing. In the bobsled event, you must carefully control the angles so your bobsled doesn't flip. The Biathlon event combines skiing to shooting ranges and shooting the targets archery-style.

meta.name: Winter Games
meta.desc: Another in the series of Epyx Olympic sports games. Compete in many different sporting events like: Ski Jump, Hot Dog, Biathlon, Bobsled, Free Skating, Figure Skating and more.

meta.name: Winter Olympiad 88
meta.desc:
This is a winter sports game that lets you compete in five Olympic events: Downhill skiing, Biathlon, Slalom, Ski Jump and Bob Sled. It is very similar to offerings like Winter Games from Epyx.
In Downhill skiing, you must avoid the obstacles and make it to the bottom of the hill, by swerving left and right and adjusting your speed by pushing the joystick forward and back. The Slalom is similar, involving skiing around flags.
In the ski jump, you must position the skis for a proper landing. In the bobsled event, you must carefully control the angles so your bobsled doesn't flip. The Biathlon event combines skiing to shooting ranges and shooting the targets archery-style.

meta.name: Winter Olympics : Lillehammer '94
meta.desc: Winter Olympics: Lillehammer 94 is, as its name suggests, the Amiga adaptation of the 1994 Winter Olympics, held in Lillehammer, Norway. The game includes five sports: biathlon, alpine skiing, ski jumping, bobsleigh and speed skating. Each of them has different disciplines and categories, faithful to the official Olympic rules. The training mode allows you to adjust your skis before trying to win the gold medal.

meta.name: Winter Supersports 92
meta.desc:
Winter Supersports 92 is a sports game with eight events from the Winter Olympiad. The basic goal is to participate in all events in a row (events can be deselected, though) and the player with the most points is the winner. If multiple players participate, two of them are playing at the same time on a split-screen. Then the next batch of two starts.
Downhill Skiing, Giant Slalom, Pro Ski Challenge are downhill courses in which the player has to circuit obstacles.
The Bale Jumping and Speed Skating events require the player to alternate pressing left and right while keeping a rhythm.
Bobsled and Luge are also similar to each other: the athletes are shown from behind and the player has to steer the bob/luge. The bob additionally has a brake.
Skidoo Racing consists of a top-down course which needs to be completed as fast as possible. Only a part of the course is shown at a time; the screen scrolls.

meta.name: Wizardry : Bane of the Cosmic Forge
meta.desc: La Forja Cósmica es una pluma mágica que tiene la capacidad de hacer realidad cualquier cosa escrita con ella. Tu grupo de personajes debe viajar a un castillo vacante una vez gobernado por un rey malvado, una reina y un mago, y descubrir qué pasó con la fragua cósmica.

meta.name: Wiz 'n' Liz
meta.desc: El juego es de plataformas y acción dividido en varias etapas. En cada una de ellas, Wiz o Liz deben recolectar wabbits antes de que se acabe el tiempo.
