Hay que recoger las letras flotantes que aparecen cuando se recolecta un wabbit y usarlas para deletrear una palabra mágica que se muestra en la parte superior de la pantalla. Una vez que se ha deletreado la palabra, los wabbits recién encontrados dejan frutas, estrellas y relojes que aumentan el límite de tiempo. El límite de tiempo también se puede extender recogiendo un orbe naranja que aparece durante los últimos diez segundos del contador, añadiendo treinta segundos más.

meta.name: Wolfpack
meta.desc: In this WW2 combat simulation one or two players can take command of one of three different sets of naval vessels. German U-boats, U.S. destroyers or Allied merchant ships are there, waiting for the right commands. They operate in small groups, just as the real things did in WW2. Full status screens tell you what state your boat is in at any time. It's possible to play one of the twelve built-in scenarios or an self-created scenario. The game has no career mode.

meta.name: Super Wonderboy : Wonderboy in Monsterland
meta.desc:
Han pasado once años desde que Tom-Tom rescató a Tanya del malvado Rey, hazaña que lo convirtió en Wonder Boy, héroe de Wonder Land. Tras una década de paz, un dragón escupefuegos y su ejército monstruoso sumieron el reino en el caos, renombrándolo Monster Land. Tom-Tom es ahora su última esperanza.
Debe atravesar doce escenarios —como la ciudad de Wonder Land, el Valle de la Paz, Baraboro, el desierto de Mam y las islas Pororo—, luchando con su espada inicial. Al derrotar monstruos obtiene oro para comprar mejor equipo. Cada nivel termina con un jefe: al vencerlo consigue una llave de oro y más recompensas. El contacto con enemigos reduce su salud, al igual que agotar la arena del reloj de arena (que debe recoger al reaparecer). Para recuperarse, puede beber en bares —obteniendo además pistas— o curarse en hospitales.

meta.name: Wonder Dog
meta.desc:
Wonder Dog is a side-scrolling platform game featuring a dog with super jumping ability and powerful throwing stars.  Wonder Dog has these abilities because he is not from Earth, but from Planet K-9. When Wonder Dog was a pup, K-9 scientists sent him to Earth to escape the impending invasion from the Pitbully Armada. Now, armed with the wonder serum, Wonder Dog must fight his way back to liberate K-9.
This game features a variety of colorful stages, several hidden bonus rounds, and a large boss character at the end of nearly every level.

meta.name: Wonderland
meta.desc: Wonderland is a text adventure with graphics, based on Lewis Carroll's classic novel Alice in Wonderland. The game follows the book's general story while adding many descriptions, locations, and puzzles of its own. The interaction with the environment is done mostly by typing; however, commands may also appear in pop-up menus and can be selected by the player. Sometimes puzzles need to be solved in order to be able to advance. The game features windows with adjustable size, separating the graphical display from inventory, command interface, text descriptions, and other options.

meta.name: Woody's World
meta.desc: Woody is an elf who has to retrieve a magical crystal which was stolen by evil forces. To do so, he has to travel through six worlds with overall 60 levels. The game plays out as a regular platformer in which Woody walks through the level, collects power-ups, avoids obstacles (e.g. blocks with nail traps or others which crash when touched) and defeats enemies by jumping on their head.

meta.name: World Championship Boxing Manager
meta.desc:
In World Championship Boxing Manager the player can develop the careers of aspiring heavyweight boxers. The option are selected through an icon-based system, representing the manager's office.
Training the boxers involves deciding which areas they should work on, considering their strengths and weaknesses and any damage inflicted in previous fights, and those of their next opponent. There are 97 of these in the game, so reaching the top of the rankings will take about 15-20 fights. Choosing a beatable opponent who can get the fight as high up the Friday Night bill as possible, as well as negotiating the best financial deal and a mutually agreeable dare, are the main considerations.

meta.name: World Championship Soccer
meta.desc:
Sega's highly successful and popular soccer game, already played by thousands on the Sega Megatech arcade machines and Genesis'consoles, has now been brought to home computers by Elite Systems.
Choose your country from twenty four international teams and select the eleven players from your squad who will play during the championship.
To win won't be easy as you're matched against some of the most skilled teams from around the world and everyone of them is out to win the final match and claim the cup. Featuring a two player option, penalty shoot-outs, practice game and a whole lot more, World Championship Soccer kicks other football games into touch.

meta.name: World Circuit
meta.desc: Formula 1 Grand Prix (conocido como World Circuit en los Estados Unidos) es la primera entrega de la serie Grand Prix de Geoff Crammond. El juego incluye los 16 circuitos internacionales de GP de 1991. Los jugadores pueden conducirlos en el modo de carrera rápida, carrera única o campeonato completo. Las 18 escuderías y los 35 pilotos y su rendimiento están basados en la temporada de 1991, pero el juego no incluye nombres reales.

meta.name: World Class Leader Board
meta.desc:
Before the long-running Links series, Access produced the Leader Board lineage, which concludes here. Wind, snap and power are the main considerations as you dodge the bunkers, water and rough which make for more complex courses than the 8-bit versions of the original.
A course editor is provided.  The courses provided include real courses like St. Andrews, a fictional designs such as The Gauntlet, which as the name suggests is designed to push your skills to the maximum.
The PC version revolutionized the use of the PC speaker to reproduce voice samples via their patented "RealSound" process. Quips like "No doubt about it, he's deep in the sandtrap", "Straight onto the fairway", and "Looks like he hit the tree, Jim." are used to provide running commentary on the gameplay.

meta.name: World Class Rugby - Five Nations Edition
meta.desc: A top down view Rugby game in which you can play both World Cup and 5 Nations tournaments.

meta.name: World Class Rugby 95
meta.desc: World Class Rugby 95 is a rugby sports game for the Commodore Amiga and follows on from its predecessors World Class Rugby and World Class Rugby: Five Nations Edition. The game brings the action-packed world of rugby to the screen and offers players the opportunity to compete in authentic rugby matches, with a focus on realistic game mechanics and fluid gameplay. As with its predecessors, the focus is on strategic team alignment, choosing the right tactics and deploying players to defeat the opposing teams. Quick passes, tackles, scrums and kicks are among the core mechanics of the game, with each match depending on the tactical finesse and skill of the player.

meta.name: World Class Rugby
meta.desc: Like Domark's Rugby: The World Cup, World Class Rugby was released alongside the 1991 Rugby World Cup, which was won by New Zealand in a final against England. Recreating this full 16-team event is an option, as are individual friendly matches and an 8-team league.

meta.name: Italy 1990
meta.desc: Italy 1990 es un juego deportivo para Amiga que recrea el Mundial de fútbol de ese mismo año. Se ve desde arriba, puedes elegir la formación antes de cada partido y ajustar la duración de los encuentros. Lo mejor: el balón se pega al pie, ideal para cambiar de dirección en seco sin perderlo.

meta.name: World Cricket
meta.desc: Time to take to the field and manage a cricket team. This one-player game allows you to choose your team from seven countries and play versus the other ones. You can choose from three lengths of tour (home and abroad). These tours include one-day, three-day and a full blown test match. The game is a standard managerial game with icons on the menu screen to allow you to manage your team. When you play a match a scoreboard appears with the runs totting up. Occasionally the game will show a highlight of a decisive moment. This is a side view, first showing the bowler then the batsman. Here the ball can hit the wicket. If the batsman hits the ball then it either shows a catch or a six. During the game if you are batting you can choose the next batsman when a wicket has fallen or if you are bowling then when things need changing you can change bowler.

meta.name: World Cup '90
meta.desc: World Cup 90 is a football game capitalizing the event of World Cup of 1990 in Italy. All the national teams participating at the event are included although due to the lack of a license, the players' names are fictional.

meta.name: World Darts
meta.desc: World Darts is a darts simulation game and it follows the traditional darts rules where you compete against an opponent to see who scores the 501 points first on a best out of three sets. If you play against the computer in a Championship knockout competition the computer will randomly select the players out of eight different opponents. Each player has his own characteristics and style of play as their 'favorite doubles' they like to throw. Regardless against whom you play they will become better as you progress towards the final. A practice mode helps you to become familiar and more skillful at throwing the darts. The game can be played by one or two players.

meta.name: World Games
meta.desc:
Olympics style sports game.  Compete in several events including:
Skiing, Weight Lifting, Barrel Jumping, Sumo Wrestling, Bull Riding, Cliff Diving, Log Rolling, Caber Toss, Pole Vault, Platform Diving.

meta.name: World Rugby
meta.desc: Time to take your favourite country from the bottom of the pile to be the best team in the world. Time to manage them and make them men, winning promotion from division 3 to division 1. After choosing your country you are taken to a list of options. Here you can pick your team, train them and check any injured players. The actual match is shown in a TV studio with a presenter. Here you see a clock counting the minutes gone in the game. When there is a decisive moment the game switches to a overhead view of the pitch. Here you can see an attempt at a try or a kick at goal. Sometimes a try is scored or the player is tackled. If a try is scored then you watch the conversion attempt.

meta.name: World Soccer
meta.desc: A very simplistic, but (when the highlights are turned off) quick and surprisingly addictive Football Management game.

meta.name: Worlds of Legend : Son of the Empire
meta.desc:
Take control of the Assassin. Berserker, Troubadour and Runemaster as they enter the mysterious Empire Of The Moon. Your quest, vengeance for the murder of the Assassin s father, the Emperor ofnnImperia. Track down the Sorcerer Ti-Mann Mochun. once the Emperor's aide, now your deadly enemy.
But watch your backs, the lands of the East are filled with Assassins and Warriors just waiting to fulfil their villainous ambitions!
Strangers will be well noticed in these parts...

meta.name: World Tour Golf
meta.desc: World Tour Golf lets you play over a dozen well known courses, including Augusta and Pebble Beach. A split screen gives you an overhead view of the hole and a 3-D view. The control uses multiple button presses to set pace and draw/fade - fortunately a Driving Range is included to practice on. When you select a club, its range is superimposed on the view, making planning shots easier. Wind, pin placement and even weather conditions must be considered as you play your shot. Also included is a course architect for creating new courses or modifying existing ones.

meta.name: World Cup Soccer : Italia '90
meta.desc:
This football simulation focuses on international football, allowing you to play a tournament or single friendly matches. Up to 8 human players can be involved in the tournament. Options include three skill levels, variable match lengths and a choice of sound or music (or both on some versions).
The match is viewed from the side, although it switches to a 3D view when the ball is close to the goal. The ball roughly sticks to the player's foot. Set pieces are controlled by moving an aiming cross-hair.

meta.name: Worms
meta.desc: Worms is a turn-based strategy game. It features up to 4 teams of 4 worms, aiming to destroy the others on a generated terrain. Each worm has 100 hit points, and dies when his hit points fall to 0. Upon death, a worm explodes, causing damage to everyone around.

meta.name: Worms - The Director's Cut
meta.desc:
Worms: The Director's Cut es una versión mejorada de Worms. Al igual que su predecesor, es un juego de artillería por turnos. El formato del juego sigue siendo el mismo, controlar pequeños ejércitos de cuatro gusanos (cuyos nombres pueden modificarse) con el único propósito de hacer estallar a todos los demás gusanos del mapa. Los jugadores pueden competir contra gusanos controlados por computadora o entre ellos.
Las armas son más extensas (y destructivas) que en el juego anterior, incluidas las primeras apariciones de Kenny-on-a-Rope, Concrete Donkey, Priceless Ming Vase, Old Woman y Holy Hand Grenade. También se incluye un editor de niveles que permite a los jugadores crear sus propios campos de batalla.

meta.name: Wrath of the Demon
meta.desc: The mighty wizard Anthrax, in an attempt to usurp authority over the kingdom, has summoned a horrifying Demon. The Demon makes good on his chartered task by summoning a horde of monsters to lay waste to the kingdom at large. Fortuitously, a random stranger is strolling nearby the kingdom and realizes that only he can beat back the foul creatures.nnnnnnAfter some encouragement from the king, the adventurer begins the game on horseback, jumping over obstacles, beating flying creatures, and collecting potions on the ground. Afterward, the hero must proceed on foot through side-scrolling platforming levels, destroying creatures with his blade as well as collecting potions and additional weapons he will find on his deadly quest.

meta.name: Wreckers
meta.desc:
Robotic droids roll quietly through the corridors of space station Beacon 04523N, automated computers calculate routes for interstellar traffic. Three human officers sleep in cryogenic tanks, awakened only for routine system checks – or in case of an emergency. With a hum, the cryogenic control springs on-line as Beacon's long-range sensors detect incoming lifeforms.
Controlling one of the on-board officers, the player has to defend the station against swarms of plasmodian spores (the “Wreckers”) showering down on Beacon and seeping into its four sections. While the spores approach, they can be sucked out of space with a gigantic hoover-like space hose. Once they settle onto the stations hull, jump into the space suit and spray infected areas with a cleansing agent. Undetected spores will seep into the station's corridors, where the protagonist must hunt them down with a plasma shots and avoid being shot in return.

meta.name: WWF WrestleMania
meta.desc:
At the height of the World Wrestling Federation's European fame came this crunching recreation of the elaborate hammed-up action. Hulk Hogan, The Ultimate Warrior or the British Bulldog can come under your control.
You play either in practice matches (against the hopefully-misnamed Mr Perfect) or in a sequence of 5 matches to win the Wrestlemania Belt. Your opponents have different special moves - watch out for The Warlord's Full Nelson and Sgt. Slaughter's Camel Clutch, for example. Before the fights start, your opponents will deliver a taunt, which you must respond to as creatively as possible.
The game is a beat 'em up viewed from a forced perspective above and behind the action. Your aim is to pin your opponent to the ground for 3 seconds, which can only be done once he has been weakened. Kicks, punches and throws will reduce an opponent's strength bar. When a strong opponent is down, stamping on him will pay off more than attempting a pin.
Avoid leaving the ring for too long - 20 seconds out and the match is void, which counts as a defeat. As in real WWF, the frame of the arena can be used to perform moves. Once players are in close contact, waggle the joystick to ensure you win the grapple.

meta.name: Xenex
meta.desc: "Xenex" is an action game for the Commodore Amiga. The game belongs to the genre of classic shoot-'em-up games and offers an intense, action-packed gaming experience that requires quick reflexes and strategic maneuvering. In "Xenex" the player takes control of a futuristic spaceship that must navigate through hostile worlds. The task is to fly through various levels and fight waves of enemies while the player collects power-ups and avoids dangerous projectiles and obstacles.

meta.name: Xenomorph
meta.desc:
You have landed your crippled ship at the Atargis mining station. The platform was deserted and no one answered your radio calls. Now you are forced to enter the station and find a way to get off the asteroid. Hopefully whatever happened to the 200 personnel in the labyrinth of mines under the station won't happen to you too.
Xenomorph is a first person RPG. Like in the Dungeon Master series, everything happens in real time. You move around in 10 foot steps and can turn 90 degrees. You have two hands to fight and use items with, a belt and holster for quick access to weapons as well as an inventory for carrying things.

meta.name: Xenon
meta.desc:
Xenon es el misterioso predecesor del mucho más conocido Xenon 2: Megablast. En realidad, el juego no se parece en nada a su secuela, con un esquema de control y una jugabilidad completamente diferentes. Sin embargo, la trama se superpone cuando los Xenites hacen su primer intento de controlar la galaxia.
Xenon es esencialmente un shooter vertical. La diferencia entre Xenon y su secuela es que aquí el jugador controla el movimiento del campo de juego (arriba o abajo) simplemente moviendo la nave en la dirección elegida. Para hacer esto en la secuela, los jugadores deben golpear su nave contra la parte inferior de la pantalla y tirar hacia atrás de la palanca para desplazarse hacia atrás en el campo de juego.
También cuenta con un campo de juego 3D (algunos enemigos, por ejemplo, estarán montados en una especie de colinas, donde los jugadores no podrán dispararles). Para combatirlos, el jugador puede transformar su tanque en un avión. Luego, el juego cambia al estilo de juego más familiar, como se ve en otros shooters de desplazamiento vertical. El avión tiene que volver a transformarse en un tanque para combatir a la mayoría de las unidades terrestres.

meta.name: Xenophobe
meta.desc:
Se recibe una llamada de socorro desde las estaciones espaciales que orbitan alrededor de su planeta, y luego se hace el silencio. Una única nave escapa, pilotada por un hombre maltratado que cuenta la historia de unas cápsulas que eclosionan en xenos que escupen ácido.
Un pequeño grupo de ingenieros ha sido enviado para combatir la amenaza xenos antes de que se apodere de todas las estaciones espaciales y, en última instancia, de tu planeta. Reúne a tu grupo de ingenieros y lucha contra los xenos en cada estación, intentando despejarla o abandonarla. Empiezas con un láser estándar, pero puedes adquirir armas adicionales a medida que las encuentres, incluyendo fáseres, pistolas de rayos, pistolas Poofer y bombas.

meta.name: Xiphos
meta.desc: As usual, a computer has been put in control of vast stretches of an intergalactic empire. As usual, it has failed and locked the entire area into limbo. As usual, you're the one who has to sort this mess out, by reaching the computer and destroying it. Unfortunately, the area en route to it is vast and treacherous, with lots of obstacles to shoot out, and you will need to trade your items in order to get enough fuel to get there. The gameplay resembles Elite, involving first-person space shooting and trading.

meta.name: X-It
meta.desc: La tarea en cada nivel de X-It es crear un camino que permita llegar hasta la salida, moviendo bloques alrededor de un terreno amurallado. La física del movimiento es bastante fiel a la vida real, la mayoría de los bloques solo se pueden empujar si hay un espacio equivalente a un bloque detrás de ellos y nada inmediatamente delante. Tendrá que lidiar con peligros como el hielo o agujeros que te hacen perder 3 vidas, tienes 5 intentos en cada pantalla.

meta.name: X-Out
meta.desc: En principio, este es otro juego de disparos de desplazamiento horizontal (técnicamente muy impresionante). El giro interesante del escenario es que no se desarrolla en el espacio como el juego similar R-Type y la mayoría de sus clones, sino que la lucha entre el bien y el mal tiene lugar bajo el agua.nnA lo largo de cinco niveles, tienes que disparar a innumerables enemigos, incluidos los obligatorios jefes de mitad de nivel y de final de nivel. La parte más innovadora de este juego llega después de un nivel, cuando puedes comprar nuevas armas: en lugar de simplemente comprar mejoras, puedes personalizar tu nave colocando tus nuevas armas en cualquier parte de ella.

meta.name: XR35 Fighter Mission
meta.desc: In this classic shooter, players take control of the XR-35 battleship and fight through enemy lines to complete their mission. The gameplay follows the tried and tested concept of the genre: the player must defeat numerous enemies and obstacles in a constantly moving environment while collecting power-ups to improve the battleship. The controls are precise, which ensures a smooth gaming experience.

meta.name: Xybots
meta.desc:
Xybots is either an unusually simple computer game or an unusually complex coin-op shoot 'em up, depending on your point of view. With either one or two players, you must move through a series of Gauntlet-style underground mazes, killing the bad guys and collecting health and other bonuses from flying saucers (underground? SLIGHT logic gap there, methinks).It's designed to be played co-operatively, although bullets from one player can harm the other.
The Xybots are out to stop you, of course, and many have advanced attack patterns as well as bullets to fire at you. Being able to view round corners is useful, allowing you to plan a strategy - often it's good to send one player forward and let the other play the waiting game, as in Gauntlet.

meta.name: Yogi Bear & Friends in the Greed Monster
meta.desc:
El Monstruo Codicioso ha robado todos los juguetes del mundo, así que Top Cat envía a los Cazatesoros de Yogi a recuperarlos. Pero… ¡todos fueron capturados, menos Yogi! Ahora, depende solo de él rescatar a sus amigos y devolver la alegría a los niños.
Controlas a Yogi en un laberinto de pantallas intermitentes (flick-screen), visto desde una perspectiva elevada. Debes explorar cada rincón buscando juguetes y compañeros, mientras esquivas o disparas a criaturas con… ¡bombones! Pero cuidado: tienes munición limitada. Si un enemigo te toca o chocas contra obstáculos, pierdes porciones de tu barra de comida; si se vacía, se acabó.
Afortunadamente, hay ítems útiles: llaves de colores para puertas iguales, latas de refresco (doble velocidad), más bombones y tarros de miel (invencibilidad temporal). ¡Pero evita la goma de mascar: te deja pegado en el sitio como si el suelo fuera chicle fresco!
Una aventura dulce, traviesa y llena de riesgos —típica de Yogi.

meta.name: Yogi's Big Clean Up
meta.desc: Yogi's Big Clean Up is a platform game, that had been developed by PAL Developments, for Hi-Tec Software, and released on the Commodore Amiga in 1992; it is the fourth title in the Yogi Bear series, and the player must help Yogi collect or fix items (which are represented by eight "I"s at the top of the screen). His energy is represented by a knife (to the left of the eight "I"s), and he gains it by collecting his show's trademark picnic baskets (as long as that bothersome Ranger Ned Smith is not watching), but if he should ever run out of energy, one of the three prongs on the fork (which represent his lives) will disappear - and if the last prong should disappear, the game will be over. However, Yogi will gain the prongs back at 20000 points and every 30000 points thereafter (if he does not still have all three)
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Yogi's Great Escape
meta.desc:
Yogi Oso acaba de despertar de su hibernación y, como siempre, busca cestas de picnic en el Parque Jellystone… hasta que escucha por casualidad una llamada espeluznante: el guardabosques Smith anuncia que el parque cerrará y todos los animales serán capturados y trasladados al zoológico. ¡Ni hablar! Yogi prefiere la libertad antes que una jaula… ¡y arranca su gran fuga!
Controlas a Yogi en seis niveles —¡el último, en pleno Nueva York!— siempre un paso por delante de un rastreador y su perro. Tienes 2 minutos y 40 segundos por nivel: si no lo completas, se acabó. Por el camino te esperan hoyos, charcos, obstáculos y personajes que te frenan; tocarlos te cuesta una de tus tres vidas.
Pero también hay recompensas: comida visible (100 puntos), ítems invisibles (250) y, en ciertos niveles, si recoges seis objetos especiales, ¡zas!: 7500 puntos de golpe. ¿Listo para correr, esquivar y, sobre todo… salvar la dignidad oso?

meta.name: Yo! Joe! Beat the Ghosts
meta.desc:
Los grafiteros llevan una vida dura. Joe y Nat siempre están huyendo, intentando escapar de la policía de Nueva York. Cuando llegan a un castillo misterioso, no hay forma de saber que ya están en serios problemas.
¡Yo! ¡Joe! Beat the Ghosts es un juego de plataformas con dos personajes. Los protagonistas pueden saltar, gatear, patear, golpear, deslizarse y nadar. Incluso son capaces de aguantar la respiración cuando están bajo el agua. Si juegas solo, "Joe" es tu personaje. Un amigo puede asumir el papel de Nat.
El objetivo del juego es deshacerse del "Profesor X", que es el malo. Los jugadores pueden atacar a sus oponentes con varias armas, como molotovs, motosierras y nunchakus.

meta.name: Will Harvey's Zany Golf
meta.desc:
Using the mouse to determine the direction and strength of your putts, you must navigate 9 tricky holes of crazy / mini golf. Try to putt into holes protected by bouncing hamburgers, windmills, etc.  Courses have several twists; one is a mad scientists's lab, another is a pinball table.  The final hole is especially bizarre, themed around energy.
You start with 3 strokes, but get the par for each hole added on, if you reach it in time -  run out of strokes, and your game is over. You can earn bonus strokes by finding hidden bonuses and by completing courses quickly.  Up to 4 players at a time can take part in this game, with anyone badly over par being eliminated as the game progresses.

meta.name: Zarathrusta
meta.desc:
Based on the classic Thrust, Zarathrusta is a cave-flying game with orthodox gameplay but an actual story behind it. Apparently, the resistance forces have captured a number of space ships, which could aid in the struggle against the empire. However, these ships need fuel, and that fuel is find in the form of "klyston pods", which must be recovered from a range of hostile environments. 
Your task is to fly your small spaceship above and below ground, capturing the pods. Your spaceship can rotate in 360 degrees, allowing for easy movements through the cavesystems, if it wasn't for gravity pulling you down, and intertia which means you could crash into walls or other objects if you don't turn around and thrust in the other direction. 
Each level is cleared by recovering the klystron pods, which are the same thing as the ball you pick up in Thrust. Pick up the pod with your tractor beam, and a towing line will be attached. Towing the ball means that you have another object altering your course, though; if you break quickly, the forces of intertia will make the ball travel forward, pulling you in its direction. At later levels, the pod becomes heavier, and must be pulled using a force field. Travelling too fast will make the ball slip out of the field, forcing you to pick it up again, possibly from a very dangerous area.
The levels are guarded by cannons, which can be shot down using either your conventional cannon or a laser cannon. Beware, though, for the laser eats up your fuel supplies very quickly. Refueling is possible by activating the tractor beam above the fuel pods stationed throughout the levels.
Whereas Thrust used vector graphics, or something with a similar look, Zarathrusta uses detailed bitmap graphics, making for a different look for a similar game.

meta.name: Zaxxon
meta.desc: ZAXXON te empuja hacia las profundidades del espacio exterior. Pon a prueba tus habilidades como piloto en la posición de comando. Prepárese para un desafío lleno de acción de supervivencia espacial. Sume puntos mientras bucea, asciende y desciende para destruir la fortaleza flotante del enemigo. ¡Esquiva las barreras láser mortales, los misiles enemigos y los disparos rápidos! Destruye los tanques de combustible enemigos y tu propio suministro se repone. Sobrevive al ataque de la flota de combate del enemigo y enfrenta el último desafío ... el poderoso robot blindado ZAXXON.

meta.name: Zeewolf 2 : Wild Justice
meta.desc: Binary Asylum's final release puts you in control of a helicopter and sets you 32 missions to complete. The level structures involve different military objectives of protecting or destroying a particular area. The surprise is in the graphics: patchwork-quilt style landscapes and a remote view reminiscent of Virus. The game offers joystick and mouse control options, as well as sections in which you must direct ships and planes. A range of weapons are offered with resupply ships on the water to dock with.

meta.name: Zeewolf
meta.desc:
With a similar gameplay as the isometric Desert Strike, Zeewolf offers arcadesque helicopter-combat in a 3D-surrounding. Despite its mainly action-oriented gameplay, the 32 levels often involve support, transport and rescue missions - dropping or refueling friendly units in the combat zone, for example. In exchange, other units serve you as rearming points or help you fighting the enemy.
The order of the levels can be chosen freely and the game may be played with joystick or - a little unusual - with the mouse.
Although the range of sight is somewhat limited, the 3D graphics are very appealing and perform smoothly while playing. Here the game uses a 3rd person-engine looking at the helicopter from the side and displaying a certain amount of landmass in a square around it.

meta.name: Zero Gravity
meta.desc: At its most basic level, Zero Gravity can be thought of as a Pong game, as the player controls a bat which must be used to hit a ball as it comes towards you. The main twist is that the gameplay is completely 3-dimensional, with control over the horizontal and vertical positions of the bat. The game uses a split-screen view, with the top half viewed from the perspective of Player 1, and the bottom from that of Player 2, even when only one of them is human.

meta.name: Ziriax
meta.desc: Ziriax is a side-scrolling futuristic "shoot-'em-up" set in a futuristic environment, similar to R-Type. The player controls a spaceship-like aircraft that is trying to survive amidst the fire of hostile ships and other enemies. There are five stages in the game altogether; each contains a fight against a boss enemy at the end. Small spheres are dropped by enemies; collecting these spheres bestows the player-controlled ship with various power-ups. These include two additional small ships above and below the main one, an ability to shoot backwards, and missiles that can be shot diagonally.

meta.name: Zombi
meta.desc:
Cuando ya no hay espacio en el infierno, los muertos regresan a la tierra.
Un gran juego que no debes perderte si te gustan la lógica y las aventuras.
Soberbio, innovador e inusual.

meta.name: Zone Warrior
meta.desc: A bunch of Geeks are killing time! The evil Geeks stole a time machine and are destroying Earth's past. Your mission is to destroy the Geeks and rescue the hostages... before time runs out! Can you step up to the challenge? Defeat the Geeks or the Earth's history is history!

meta.name: Zool 2
meta.desc:
Zool 2 es un juego de plataformas en el que controlas al "Ninja de la enésima dimensión" (o a su novia, Zooz, que puede completar cada nivel de una manera ligeramente diferente), mientras recorre los niveles, recogiendo innumerables delicias, disparando a cualquier enemigo que encuentre y obteniendo bonificaciones (hay varios potenciadores especiales que puede encontrar, por ejemplo, una bomba que lo sigue y puede explotar en cualquier momento para eliminar los enemigos en pantalla o invulnerabilidad temporal).
Lo nuevo en la secuela es la capacidad de Zool para escalar paredes y sus nuevos ataques giratorios. Hay muchas áreas ocultas para ver, incluido un juego adicional de Breakout protagonizado por el perro de dos cabezas de Zool.

meta.name: Zool : Ninja of the “Nth” Dimension
meta.desc:
Eres Zool un gremlin de la enésima dimensión. Te ves obligado a aterrizar en la Tierra y para ganar el ranking ninja, tiene que pasar siete tierras, derrotando a un jefe al final de cada una de ellas.
El juego contiene una serie de minijuegos integrados, incluidos varios juegos de arcade, un tirador espacial con desplazamiento y un juego al que solo se puede acceder haciendo que Zool toque una determinada melodía en un piano del juego o encontrando ciertos puntos de deformación invisibles.

meta.name: Zool : Ninja of the “Nth” Dimension
meta.desc:
Eres Zool un gremlin de la enésima dimensión. Te ves obligado a aterrizar en la Tierra y para ganar el ranking ninja, tiene que pasar siete tierras, derrotando a un jefe al final de cada una de ellas.
El juego contiene una serie de minijuegos integrados, incluidos varios juegos de arcade, un tirador espacial con desplazamiento y un juego al que solo se puede acceder haciendo que Zool toque una determinada melodía en un piano del juego o encontrando ciertos puntos de deformación invisibles.

meta.name: Zoom!
meta.desc: Zoom! is an arcade style puzzle game.  Your character Zoomer (a Pacman lookalike with arms & legs) must trace the outline of the squares on the game board to light them up.  Points are awarded when full squares are formed, although the game also displays how many lines must still be completed. You proceed to the next level when all the squares have been lit up.  There are various monsters that will try to hunt you down - contact with these costs you energy and eventually a life. There are also a number of power-ups that will aid your quest - quick filling of tiles surrounding the bonus piece, a level skip and bonus points, for example.

meta.name: Z-Out
meta.desc: Al igual que su predecesor X-Out, Z-Out es un shoot 'em up de desplazamiento lateral. Una horda de enemigos en gran parte orgánicos amenaza la seguridad de tu planeta y deben ser destruidos a lo largo de seis niveles. Hay potenciadores disponibles, pero el juego está menos centrado en ellos que otros.

meta.name: Zynaps
meta.desc: This horizontally-scrolling shoot 'em up features 16 levels and 450 screens of Nemesis-inspired action. You pilot a spacecraft through the levels, shooting as many of the encroaching meanies and mounted turrets as possible. Power-up tokens are offered for shooting some, which can be used to obtain better weapons including ground-attack lasers, speed ups and multiple bullets. Extra lives are on offer as well, which you'll certainly need, especially as you have to go back a long way when losing a life.
